A: Flat+Lazy ▾
B: Nested+TTL ▾
C: Ring+Capacity ▾
D: StateMachine ▾
E: Multi-Collection ▾
Init L1 CRUD L2 Sort L3 TTL L4 Backup L5 Batch L6 Rate Limit
Gotchas Errors Quick Ref

Python Field Manual

Exam Mode — 忘記咗點搵返

目標唔係背晒全部。目標係見到 spec 之後，30 秒內知道自己應該去手冊邊度搵答案。

Step 1：先分 Group → Flat+Lazy / Nested+TTL / Ring+Capacity / StateMachine / Multi-Collection

Step 2：再分 Level 3 pattern → lazy helper / inline TTL / capacity / backoff / transfer

Step 3：最後分 L5-L6 → single-key lock / pair-lock / worker pool / fail-fast / all-sleep

如果你見到 spec 講第一反應去睇邊 section
clockwise, ring, replica, virtual nodeHashring familyHashring / ChatRoute / Group C
request size, memory, ram, bandwidthChatRoute delta，load 係 MB 唔係 countChatRoute L2/L4/L6
field, scan, prefix, ttlInMemDB / DNS familyInMemDB / DNS / Group B
strictly less thants < expiry，到期嗰秒算死L3 TTL Variants
remaining lifespan, restorebackup 存 remaining TTL，restore 重算 expiryInMemDB L4 / DNS L4
worker, num_workers, queueworker pool，唔係 one-op-per-coroutineTaskQueue L5 / L6 Patterns
dependency, blocked untilDAG / state machineTaskQueue L4 / Workflow
copy, transfer, upgrade兩個 key，要 sorted() 防 deadlockL5 Concurrent Batch Variants
without simulating, skip missingfail-fast，check 喺 sem 前L6 Rate Limited Variants
every request must attempt, even if missingall-sleep，fail 都要 sleepL6 Rate Limited Variants
Google 使用法：
只查 Python syntax / stdlib：python asyncio semaphore gather、python sorted desc asc tie、python bisect right、python deepcopy
唔好查整段 spec，唔好查完整 business logic，唔好開任何 AI tab。

Keyword Map — 開場先搵咩字

你喺 notes / browser 應該搵嘅字用途
fail-fast所有「invalid 唔 sleep」L6 題
all-sleep所有「失敗都要 call API」L6 題
worker poolTaskQueue / fixed workers / queue 抢 task
remaining_ttlbackup / restore with TTL
sorted 防 deadlockcopy / transfer / upgrade / pair lock
strictly less thanTTL boundary
computed metricqty * price / efficiency / revenue per night sorts
state machineQUEUED / PROCESSING / COMPLETED / FAILED 類
inline TTLInMemDB / DNS 呢類唔真刪 pattern
lazy helperBank / Hotel / retry / scheduled events

搵字原則：唔好 search domain 全名先，先 search pattern 字。因為 domain 名你可能記錯，但 fail-fast、remaining_ttl、worker pool 呢啲唔會錯。

Pair Compare — 一樣同唔同

Pair一樣最重要差異
Hashring ↔ ChatRoutering、clockwise route、virtual nodes、topology change 後 reroute、L5 lock per request_id、L6 多數 fail-fastChatRoute load 係 size_mb；L4 eviction 按 memory；L6 多 bandwidth check
InMemDB ↔ DNSnested store、inline TTL、ts < expiry、backup 存 remaining TTL、restore 重算 expiry、L5 lock per top-level keyInMemDB L2 係 scan / scan_by_prefix format；DNS 有 domain / resolve / wildcard 語意；L6 可能轉 fail-fast
TaskQueue ↔ Workflowstate machine、status transition、dependency flavour、L6 lifecycle / dispatch 味道近TaskQueue 有 retry/backoff + worker pool；Workflow 更似 multi-step transitions / rollback
Bank ↔ FileSystemflat dict base、L2 sort/filter/format、L5 單 key / 雙 key lock、L6 fail-fast 常見Bank L3 係 scheduled cashback；FileSystem L3 係 TTL expiry；FileSystem 有 copy overwrite 同 quota

你而家嘅學法係啱：先揀一條 base，再用第二條題只記 delta。臨場如果唔記得，唔好由頭讀晒個 domain，先問自己：

1. 呢條題係邊個 base？ 2. 邊個 field / return type 改咗名？ 3. L3 真正 pattern 係 helper、inline TTL、capacity，定 transfer？ 4. L6 係 fail-fast 定 all-sleep？

Concepts — 由 L1 Run 到 L6

呢頁唔係字典。 你要做嘅係由 `L1` 一路 run 到 `L6`，每見到一個 term，就即刻對返 mock 入面嗰個樣。

第三欄只用 mock 畫面。即係 `TTL` 唔再抽象講，而係直接話你：`FS / Session` 係點樣、`InMemDB / DNS` 又係點樣。

讀法： 先睇第二欄認樣，再睇第三欄個 mock 畫面，最後先 click 第四欄返去原文。你而家唔需要背 term 定義，只需要見到 term 就彈到返邊個 mock。

最易混 Compare

易混位AB你要逼自己記住
Reject vs Overwrite Reject duplicate
Bank / Hashring / Hotel		 Overwrite existing
DNS / InMemDB set		 同樣都叫 add / set，duplicate policy 可以完全相反。
見到 if exists return False 定 replace existing 要即刻分。
TTL 兩個樣 Purge / 真刪
FS / Session / PubSub / LogAgg		 Inline check / 留喺度但當死咗
InMemDB / DNS		 Purge 係過期就唔再喺 collection 入面。
Inline 係 record 仲喺 dict，但 read 嗰下 return 空 / 當 invalid。
TTL vs Retry TTL
件嘢過時，唔再有效。		 Retry / Backoff
件嘢未死，只係改時間下次再試。		 TTL 問「仲活唔活？」
Retry 問「幾時再做？」
TaskQueue L3 唔好錯當做 TTL。
Expire 後點處理 Delete / Purge
FS / Session / PubSub		 Flip status
PkgMgr DEPRECATED / OrderBook EXPIRED		 有啲 L3 過期係刪走，有啲唔刪，只係改 status。
見到 DEPRECATED / EXPIRED 就諗 status flip。
Backup 兩個樣 Plain deepcopy
Bank / Hotel / LogAgg		 remaining TTL restore
InMemDB / DNS		 冇 TTL 嘅 backup 直接抄。
有 TTL 嘅 restore 唔可以搬返舊 expiry，要重算 remaining。
One-shot vs Recurring One-shot
做完停。		 Recurring
做完再排下一次。		 Scheduler L4 最重要係：
execute_at += interval，status 會重設返 SCHEDULED。
Retry vs Recurring Retry / Backoff
TaskQueue L3		 Recurring schedule
Scheduler L4		 Retry 係因為上次失敗，所以改 next_due。
Recurring 係本身就要每隔一段時間再跑一次，唔係因為 fail。
Hashring vs ChatRoute L2 Count load
數幾多個 key / request。		 Size load
數總 size_mb。		 Hashring = 數人頭
ChatRoute = 數總 MB
兩個骨架一樣，但 metric 唔同。
Top N vs Range Filter Top N
Bank / Leaderboard / Hashring		 Range / Threshold
TaskQueue / Hashring variants		 Top N 係排完攞頭幾個。
Range 係先 filter 條件，再返晒合格項目，唔一定 format 成 name(value)。
Health timeout vs TTL boundary Health
(ts - last_heartbeat) <= timeout		 TTL
ts < expiry		 兩條都係時間比較，但 boundary 唔同。
Health 多數見 <= timeout；TTL 常見係 strictly less than。
History Query vs Restore History query
Bank / Workflow		 Restore state
InMemDB / DNS		 History 只係查舊畫面，查完而家個 state 唔變。
Restore 係真係將系統退返去某張快照。
Latest <= ts vs Exact Snapshot Latest at or before
InMemDB / DNS main		 Exact match only
restore_strict variant		 見到 most recent backup at or before 就係搵最近一張。
見到 exact snapshot timestamp 就唔可以偷用 latest-before logic。
Single-key lock vs Pair-lock Single-key
InMemDB / DNS / PubSub		 Pair-lock
Bank transfer / FS copy / Hotel upgrade		 一個 op 只掂一個 key → 一把 lock。
一次改兩邊 → 兩把 lock，仲要 sorted() 防 deadlock。
Lock vs Semaphore Lock
保護 shared state。		 Semaphore
限制外部 call 名額。		 Lock 係「唔畀人同時改爛 data」。
Semaphore 係「一次只放 N 個 request 出街」。L6 好多時兩樣都同時存在。
Gather vs Worker Pool Gather shell
每個 op 自己一個 coroutine。		 Worker pool
固定 N 個 worker 搶 queue。		 TaskQueue L5 唔係普通 gather。
見到 num_workers / queue 就即刻轉去 worker pool 腦區。
Input Order vs Finish Order Return 跟 input 順序
gather list / results[i]		 實際完成次序可以亂
worker pool / concurrent ops		 並發入面邊個先做完可以唔同，但 spec 多數仲係要你按 input 位次返答案。
TaskQueue L6 用 results[index] 就係為咗鎖返順序。
Fail-Fast vs All-Sleep Fail-Fast
invalid item 唔入 sem，唔 sleep。		 All-Sleep
invalid item 都照入 sem，照 sleep。		 Fail-fast = fail 咗冇 sleep
All-sleep = fail 咗都照 sleep
呢個係 L6 最值錢分法。
Fail-Fast vs Lifecycle Dispatch Simple fail-fast
Bank / DNS / Hashring		 Lifecycle dispatch
TaskQueue / Workflow		 有啲 L6 只係 check + sleep + return。
有啲仲要改 status：started -> dispatched / failed。

每 Level 仲會考乜

Level全 mock 掃出嚟最常見 concept你已經學咗嗰幾條要特別記代表 mock / level
L1 CRUD contract、data structure、duplicate policy（reject / overwrite）、return type、order counter / id counter、list/set collection。 Hashring / ChatRoute： ring + clockwise route。
InMemDB / DNS： nested dict 骨架。
TaskQueue： task board 基本 shape。		 Hashring L1、ChatRoute L1、InMemDB L1、DNS L1、TaskQueue L1
Bank L1、FS L1
L2 sort / filter / search / prefix scan、tie-break、formatted output、top-N vs range filter、count / ranking / aggregate、computed metric、route + stats / load、state transition。 ChatRoute：load = size_mb 總和，唔係 count。
InMemDB / DNS：scan / scan_by_prefix。
TaskQueue：開始入 state machine。		 ChatRoute L2、InMemDB L2、DNS L2、TaskQueue L2
Bank L2、Workflow L2、OrderBook L2
L3 TTL boundary、lazy purge vs inline check、scheduled / auto-trigger、retry + backoff、virtual nodes / replicas、inactive timeout、health / status auto-change、expiry flips status。 Hashring / ChatRoute：virtual nodes = 同一間舖開幾間分店。
InMemDB / DNS：inline TTL。
TaskQueue：retry with exponential backoff。
Bank：lazy helper 係最典型 base。		 Hashring L3、ChatRoute L3、InMemDB L3、DNS L3
TaskQueue L3、Bank L3、PubSub L3、Chat L3
L4 backup / snapshot / restore、remaining TTL、latest-at-or-before vs exact snapshot lookup、history / historical query vs restore、merge / upgrade / move、dependency / DAG / circular check、rollback、capacity / eviction、offset / cursor / stateful read、domain-specific delta（partial fill、sticky session）。 Hashring / ChatRoute：memory eviction / LRU。
InMemDB / DNS：restore 要重算 remaining TTL。
TaskQueue：DAG deps。
Workflow：rollback。
Bank / Hotel：merge vs upgrade。		 Hashring L4、ChatRoute L4、InMemDB L4、DNS L4
TaskQueue L4、Workflow L4、Bank L4、Hotel L4
L5 async batch shell、preserve input order、single-key lock、pair-lock with sorted order、worker pool、lock scope（per-key / per-domain / per-topic / per-channel / per-workflow）、gather result shape。 Hashring / ChatRoute：per-request lock。
InMemDB / DNS：per-key / per-domain lock。
TaskQueue：worker pool，唔係 gather pattern。
Bank / FS：pair-lock。		 Hashring L5、ChatRoute L5、InMemDB L5、DNS L5
TaskQueue L5、Bank L5、FS L5、Workflow L5
L6 semaphore、check before sem vs inside sem、fail-fast vs all-sleep、external call simulation、lock + sem layering、lifecycle dispatch、extra prechecks、snapshot before await、result order / partial failure handling、domain-specific invalid rule。 ChatRoute：多一個 bandwidth precheck。
DNS：fail-fast + semaphore。
TaskQueue / Workflow：lifecycle dispatch。
InMemDB / Notification / PubSub / LogAgg：all-sleep 味道要分清。		 ChatRoute L6、DNS L6、TaskQueue L6、Workflow L6
InMemDB L6、Notification L6、PubSub L6、LogAgg L6

L1

你會撞到咩你要點樣認你腦入面要有嘅畫面（用 mock）去邊個 mock / level 睇返
flat dict 一層 map。你拎一個 id，就直接搵到成份資料。

Bank L1：account_id → account info

self.accounts = {
  "alice": {
    "balance": 500,
    "outgoing": 0
  }
}

FS L1：path → file info

self.files = {
  "/foo.txt": {"size_kb": 100}
}
 Bank L1、Hotel L1、FS L1、Leaderboard L1
Notification L1、Session L1、Scheduler L1、Workflow L1
PkgMgr L1、OrderBook L1、Gym L1
nested dict 上面一個 key，入面再分 field / sub-key。即係「大櫃桶入面再有細櫃桶」。

InMemDB L1：key → field → value

self.data = {
  "user1": {
    "name":  {"value": "alice", "expiry": None},
    "email": {"value": "a@b.com", "expiry": None},
  }
}

DNS L1：domain → record_type → value 味道一樣，只係名唔同。

 InMemDB L1、DNS L1、Permission L1
hash ring 你要諗一條街，上面有舖頭同有人。個人行到某個位，就沿住條街向前搵第一間舖。

Hashring L1 / ChatRoute L1：街上面每間舖有自己門牌位。

self.nodes = {
  "node_a": {
    "replicas": 1,
    "positions": [20],
  },
  "node_b": {
    "replicas": 1,
    "positions": [60],
  },
}

hash(request_id) 出咗個位之後，就 clockwise 搵第一間舖。

 Hashring L1、Hashring L2、ChatRoute L1、ChatRoute L2
duplicate / overwrite policy L1 好常見會順手考你：重複 add 係 reject 定 overwrite？唔同 domain 會唔同。

Bank L1：同一個 account 再 register，多數係 reject。

if account_id in self.accounts:
    return False

DNS L1：overwrite variant 會直接蓋舊 record。

self.records[domain][record_type] = value

你個腦要記：同樣都係 CRUD，但 duplicate policy 可能完全相反。

 Bank L1、DNS L1、LoadBal L1
task board 你要諗一塊 task 板，key 係 task_id，value 係張單嘅資料。

TaskQueue L1：一開始未有 status，只係記住排隊資訊。

self.tasks = {
  "單1": {
    "priority": 3,
    "added_order": 1,
  }
}
 TaskQueue L1
list / set inside dict 有啲 L1 唔係淨係一層 value，而係 value 入面已經有 list / set。見到 topic、subscriber、messages 呢類字就要留意。

PubSub L1：一個 topic 入面同時有 subscribers 同 messages。

self.topics = {
  "cooking": {
    "subscribers": {"alice", "bob"},
    "messages": [],
  },
}

Chat L1：channel 入面都會有 user list + message list。

 PubSub L1、Chat L1
L1 先問自己：一層？兩層？街上舖頭？定 task 板？通常分到呢步，domain 已經縮細好多。

L2

你會撞到咩你要點樣認你腦入面要有嘅畫面（用 mock）去邊個 mock / level 睇返
sort / format 呢層好多時唔係新 data structure，只係將 L1 嘅資料拎出嚟排序同格式化。

Bank L2：top_spenders 類型，通常係 sort by 數字 desc，再用字串做 tie-break。

items.sort(key=lambda x: (-x[1], x[0]))

FS L2："/foo.txt(100)" 呢種 format string 亦係 L2 常客。

 Bank L2、Hotel L2、FS L2、Leaderboard L2
Notification L2、Session L2、Scheduler L2、Workflow L2
PkgMgr L2、OrderBook L2、PubSub L2、Chat L2
LogAgg L2、Gym L2
top-N vs range filter 見到 top / highest / ranked 多數係排完攞頭幾個。見到 between / above / threshold 多數係 range filter。

Bank L2：top_spenders 係排完攞前 n 個。

return result[:n]

TaskQueue / Hashring variants：係問「邊啲 item 符合條件」，唔一定只攞頭幾個。

if min_load <= load <= max_load:
    result.append(node_id)

你個腦要記：top-N = 排名題；range = filter 題。

 Bank L2、Leaderboard L2、Hashring L2、TaskQueue L2
route + stats / load metric 呢條係 ring family 嘅 L2。唔再只係 route，仲要開始「記低邊個 item 派咗去邊個 node」，再做 load / top-N stats。

Hashring L2：store_key 之後，load 係「幾多個 key / request」。

self.keys[key] = node
...
count += 1
items = sorted(loads.items(), key=lambda x: (-x[1], x[0]))

ChatRoute L2：個骨架一樣，但 load 唔係 count，係 size_mb 總和。

if request_id not in self.request_sizes:
    self.request_sizes[request_id] = size_mb
...
total = total + self.request_sizes[req_id]

你個腦要記：Hashring L2 = 數人頭，ChatRoute L2 = 數總 MB。

 Hashring L2、ChatRoute L2
search / filter keyword 見到 search、contains、matching、top 呢類字，通常係喺 L1 資料上面做文字 filter 或 count filter。

Chat L2：messages / channels 按 keyword 搵。

if keyword in msg["content"]:
    results.append(msg)

FS L2：largest matching files 呢類都係同一味：先 filter，再 sort。

 Chat L2、FS L2、Notification L2
prefix scan 只搵開頭係某幾個字嘅項目。見到 prefix、scan、list by prefix 就要醒。

InMemDB L2：掃同一個 key 入面所有 field。

for f in self.data[key]:
    if f.startswith(prefix):
        fields.append(f)

DNS L2：味道一樣，只係 field 變 record / subdomain。

 InMemDB L2、FS L2、DNS L2、PkgMgr L2、Chat L2
state machine 同一件嘢會喺幾個 status 之間轉。見到 QUEUED / PROCESSING / COMPLETED 呢類字就要轉去呢個腦區。

TaskQueue L2：task 本身開始帶住 status。

self.tasks = {
  "單1": {
    "priority": 3,
    "status": "QUEUED",
    "added_order": 1,
  },
  "單2": {
    "priority": 5,
    "status": "PROCESSING",
    "added_order": 2,
  },
}

Workflow L3 / L4：都係同一個 core，只係多咗 transition rule 同 rollback。

 TaskQueue L2、TaskQueue L3、TaskQueue L4
Workflow L3、Workflow L4、OrderBook L3
L2 通常仲唔會大改骨架，但會開始出三條線：`sort / format`、`scan / search`、`route 後做 stats/load`。你而家 run page 時，記住 ring family 喺 L2 唔係空白。

L3

你會撞到咩你要點樣認你腦入面要有嘅畫面（用 mock）去邊個 mock / level 睇返
TTL + inline check 一見到 ttl、expires_at、strictly less than，就知呢層係講時間。最重要係即刻分到：係 `先 purge`，定 `read 嗰下 inline check`。

FS L3 / Session L3：先 purge，再當件嘢唔存在。

self._purge_expired(timestamp)
if path not in self.files:
    return -1

InMemDB L3 / DNS L3：件嘢仲擺喺度，但 read 嗰下 inline check。

rec = self.data[key][field]
if rec["expiry"] is not None and timestamp >= rec["expiry"]:
    return ""

你個腦要分到：FS / Session 係「清走佢」，InMemDB / DNS 係「留喺度但當佢死咗」。

 InMemDB L3、DNS L3、FS L3、Session L3
Permission L3、LRU L3、PkgMgr L3、OrderBook L3
PubSub L3、Chat L3、LogAgg L3、Gym L3

大約做法：先決定你係 purge family 定 inline check family。inline 就寫 _is_alive(rec, ts) / _visible(...)，再喺 get/scan/delete_at 呢啲 read path 每次先 check；purge family 就另外寫 _purge_expired(ts)，再喺 public methods 開頭 call。
lazy helper 有啲事本來應該「過一陣自動發生」，但實作唔會開 timer，而係下次有人掂到個 system 先順手補做。

Bank L3：你一做新 operation，先補做到期 cashback。

def pay(self, timestamp, ...):
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)
    ...

Notification L3：讀 / 寫 alert 前先補做到期 escalation，個味一樣。

 Bank L3、Hotel L3、FS L3、Leaderboard L3
Notification L3、Session L3、Scheduler L3、Permission L3
PkgMgr L3、OrderBook L3、PubSub L3、Chat L3
LogAgg L3、Gym L3

大約做法：先寫一個 _process_due(ts) / _process_cashbacks(ts) helper，入面行晒 pending items，見到到期就補做；之後所有 public methods 第一行都 call 呢個 helper。你要記住 lazy helper 唔係改一個 method，而係「先加 helper，再插入所有入口位」。
retry / backoff / next_due 見到 retry、attempt、backoff、next run、retry scheduled 呢類字，就要知唔係普通 TTL，係「失敗後幾時再試」。

TaskQueue L3：失敗唔係即刻死，而係改 status + 記下一次幾時再試。

retry_time = ts + base_delay * (2 ** attempt)
task["status"] = "RETRY_SCHEDULED"

你個腦要記：呢條線重點係 time to retry，唔係 time to expire。
同 Scheduler L4 recurring 唔同，retry 係因為 fail 先再排。

 TaskQueue L3

大約做法：先加 attempt/status/next_due 呢幾個欄位；再寫一段 retry scheduling logic 去計 base_delay * (2 ** attempt)；fail 時唔 delete task，只 update status 同 next_due；之後揀 ready task 嗰段要記得 skip 未到 next_due 嘅 task。
expiry flips status 有啲 L3 過期唔係刪走件嘢，而係改佢 status。見到 DEPRECATED、EXPIRED 呢類字就要醒。

PkgMgr L3：到期後 package 變 DEPRECATED。

if now >= deprecation_time:
    pkg["status"] = "DEPRECATED"

OrderBook L3：order 到期後變 EXPIRED，唔會再 match。

 PkgMgr L3、OrderBook L3
auto-trigger / dual timer 見到 trigger、inactive、deadline、two TTLs 呢類字，就知同一個 system 可能有兩條時間線一齊跑。

Workflow / Scheduler：到條件就自動推下一步。

self._process_triggers(...)

Chat L3：同時有 message_ttl_ms 同 inactive_ttl_ms 兩條 timer。

def __init__(self, message_ttl_ms=None, inactive_ttl_ms=None):
 Workflow L3、Scheduler L3、Chat L3、Notification L3
health / availability flip 見到 heartbeat、timeout、healthy、unhealthy 呢類字，就知呢個 L3 唔係 TTL，而係「仲可唔可以用」。

LoadBal L3：server 有冇按時 heartbeat，會影響 route 時可唔可以揀佢。

return (timestamp - info["last_heartbeat"]) <= self.health_timeout

你個腦要記：<= timeout = healthy，呢條 boundary 同 TTL 嗰條 < expiry 唔同。

 LoadBal L3
virtual nodes + replicas 你慣用嗰個畫面就啱：同一間舖喺條街唔只一個位，而係開咗幾間分店幫手接客。

Hashring L3 / ChatRoute L3：同一個 node/server 有幾個 positions。

self.nodes = {
  "node_c": {
    "replicas": 3,
    "positions": [15, 42, 78],
  },
}

即係：node_c 唔只一個門牌，係同一間舖開三間分店。

 Hashring L3、ChatRoute L3
L3 最值錢嘅分法：`TTL 兩個樣`、`lazy helper`、`virtual nodes / capacity`。你而家最易混就係呢度，所以第三欄特登用 mock 對照寫。

L4

你會撞到咩你要點樣認你腦入面要有嘅畫面（用 mock）去邊個 mock / level 睇返
backup / restore + remaining TTL 呢兩樣通常一齊出。先影相，再返去某張相；如果條題本身有 TTL，restore 時通常唔係搬返舊 expiry，而係重算剩返幾耐命。仲要留意 spec 係咪寫 latest at or before，定係要 exact snapshot。

Bank / InMemDB L4：成個 data structure 深拷貝落 backup。

snapshot = copy.deepcopy(self.data)
self.backups.append((timestamp, snapshot))
...
self.data = restored

InMemDB / DNS 有 TTL 嗰條線：

remaining = exp - backup_ts
info["expires_at"] = timestamp + remaining

你個腦要再加一句：main = latest <= backup_ts；如果 spec 寫 exact timestamp，就唔好用 latest-before 嗰套。

 Bank L4、InMemDB L4、FS L4、Leaderboard L4
DNS L4、Permission L4、LogAgg L4

大約做法：先定 backup 要存咩 shape。冇 TTL 就直接 deepcopy；有 TTL 就 backup 時改存 remaining_ttl，唔好存舊 absolute expiry。restore 時先揀 snapshot（latest <= ts 定 exact），再 rebuild data，最後用 now + remaining_ttl 重算 expiry。
history query vs restore 兩樣都會令你見到「以前」嗰個字眼，但其實做嘅嘢唔同。history query 係問以前點樣；restore 係將而家真係退返去以前。

Bank L4：查某個時間點 balance，查完而家個 account 唔會變。

for ts, val in reversed(history):
    if ts <= time_at:
        return val

InMemDB / DNS L4：restore 完之後，現時個 store 真係換咗返快照內容。

self.data = restored_state

你個腦要問自己：「我而家只係想睇舊畫面，定真係想改 current state？」

 Bank L4、InMemDB L4、DNS L4、Workflow L4
history / rollback / historical query 見到 history、get_at_time、rollback、snapshot 呢類字，就知 L4 唔只係而家個 state，仲要問返以前或者退返轉頭。

Bank L4：會查某個時間點嘅資料。

for item in reversed(history):
    if item["timestamp"] <= time_at:
        return item

Workflow L4：一 fail 就 rollback，將完成咗嘅 step 退返做 pending。

if step_failed:
    rollback_completed_steps()
 Bank L4、Workflow L4、Notification L4、LogAgg L4
recurring / next execution 見到 interval、recurring、next execution 呢類字，就知同一個 item 會自動將未來時間再推前一次。

Scheduler L4：event 觸發完唔係結束，而係將下一次時間加返 interval。

"rec_1": {"execute_at": 3000, "status": "SCHEDULED", "interval": 1000}
...
"execute_at": 4000

你個腦要記：one-shot 觸發完停，recurring 觸發完會再排下一次。
同 TaskQueue retry 唔同，呢度唔係 fail 咗先重試。

 Scheduler L4
merge / move / upgrade 見到 merge、upgrade、move、copy into 呢類字，就知 L4 會考兩份 state 點樣合埋同埋舊 reference 點處理。

Bank L4：merge 兩個 account。

balance_a += balance_b
del self.accounts[b]

Hotel / Chat：upgrade room 或 merge channel，本質都係搬 state 去另一邊。

 Bank L4、Hotel L4、Chat L4、FS L4
sticky / affinity 見到 sticky、session、use previous server、failover 呢類字，就知要記住「上次派去邊」。

LoadBal L4：user 有 sticky mapping，server 仲 healthy 就用返舊嗰個。

self.sticky = {}  # user_id -> server_id
# 有 sticky + healthy -> 用返佢
# 否則 round-robin failover
 LoadBal L4
dependency + readiness A 要等 B 做完先做到。見到 dependencies、blocked until、all deps completed 呢啲字就去呢度。

TaskQueue L4：另一條 L4 常見線就係 ready check。

"單4": {
  ...
  "dependencies": ["單2", "單3"]
}

def _deps_met(task_id):
    for dep_id in deps:
        if self.tasks[dep_id]["status"] != "COMPLETED":
            return False

你個腦要記： restore 嗰行係 time/history；deps 嗰行係 ready/not ready。

 TaskQueue L4、PkgMgr L4、Workflow L4
InMemDB L4、DNS L4、Permission L4
partial fill / remaining quantity 見到 remaining、partial、trade_qty 呢類字，就知一個 item 可以做咗一部分但未完。

OrderBook L4：成交量用細嗰邊，做完之後兩邊 remaining 扣數。

trade_qty = min(best_buy["remaining"], best_sell["remaining"])
best_buy["remaining"] -= trade_qty

你個腦要記：status 可能由 ACTIVE 變 PARTIAL，唔係一口氣完單。

 OrderBook L4
offset / cursor / stateful read 讀取唔一定次次由頭嚟。有啲 L4 會記「上次讀到邊」。見到 offset、consume、next unread 呢類字就要醒。

PubSub L4：每個 `(topic, user)` 記住下次由邊個 index 開始讀。

self.offsets[(topic_id, user_id)] = next_index

你個腦要記：呢個唔係 sort/filter，而係「讀取進度」本身都係 state。

 PubSub L4
capacity + eviction 爆位喇，要踢走舊嘢先塞到新嘢入去。通常會跟住 capacity / memory / LRU 一齊出。

Hashring L4 / ChatRoute L4：server 爆 memory，要先踢 LRU request。

When a node is full:
evict the LRU key first,
then store the new key.

Session / LRU：個味同樣都係「爆位先踢最舊 / 最少用嗰個」。

 Hashring L4、ChatRoute L4、Session L4、LRU L3/L4
L4 常見就係：影快照、restore、dependency、capacity / eviction。好多時都係將 L3 嗰個 base 再加 state/history。

L5

你會撞到咩你要點樣認你腦入面要有嘅畫面（用 mock）去邊個 mock / level 睇返
gather / preserve input order L5 好多題最外層都係 batch shell。見到 list of operations / inputs，多數要 keep 返 output 順序同 input 一樣。

InMemDB L5 / ChatRoute L5：外層都係 collect coroutines 再 gather。

tasks.append(do_one(op))
results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
return list(results)

TaskQueue L6：就算 worker 真實完成次序亂咗，都會用 input index 填返結果位。

results[index] = True

你個腦要記：並發 ≠ 打亂結果順序。

 InMemDB L5、ChatRoute L5、PubSub L5、Chat L5
single-key lock + async batch 每個 top-level key 自己有把鎖。同一個 key 要排隊，唔同 key 可以同時做。通常會同 asyncio.gather / batch 一齊出。

InMemDB L5 / DNS L5：

self.key_locks =
    defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)

async with self.key_locks[key]:
    ...

PubSub / Chat：只係 key 名換成 topic / channel。

 InMemDB L5、DNS L5、Permission L5、Notification L5
Session L5、Scheduler L5、Workflow L5、PkgMgr L5
OrderBook L5、PubSub L5、Chat L5、LogAgg L5、Gym L5

大約做法：__init__ 先加 defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)；batch method 入面寫一個 do_one(op)；每個 op 先用 top-level key 攞 lock，再 call 返同步 CRUD/helper；最外層先 gather，咁結果順序自然跟 input。
pair-lock + transfer/copy 一次 operation 要同時改兩邊，所以要鎖兩把鎖。見到 transfer、copy、upgrade 呢啲字就要諗 sorted pair-lock。

Bank L5 / Hotel L5 / FS L5：先 sort，避免 A 等 B、B 又等 A。

a, b = sorted([source_id, target_id])
async with lock[a]:
    async with lock[b]:
        ...
 Bank L5、Hotel L5、FS L5

大約做法：先抽出會郁邊兩個 key / entity；用 sorted([a, b]) 固定鎖順序；如果其實係同一個 key，就唔好 re-lock；兩把 lock 都攞到之後先做 transfer/copy/upgrade 真正邏輯。
worker pool + queue 固定幾個工人，不停喺條 queue 攞 task 做。呢個係 L5 裏面最似真 async system 嘅一款。

TaskQueue L5：每個 worker 不停 loop，攞下一張 ready task。

async def worker():
    while True:
        async with self._lock:
            tid = self._get_next_ready_task_id()
            if not tid:
                return
 TaskQueue L5

大約做法：先寫一個 _get_next_ready_task_id() helper；再開 num_workers 個 worker() loop。每個 worker 先攞下一張 ready task，冇就 return；有就 mark processing、做 work、再改 completed/failed。呢個 mental model 係「固定工人搶 queue」，唔係一張單開一個 coroutine。
L5 先問自己：外面係唔係 `gather shell`？入面係 `一個 key`、`兩個 key`，定 `幾個 worker 搶 queue`？大部分題都落喺呢幾格入面。

L6

你會撞到咩你要點樣認你腦入面要有嘅畫面（用 mock）去邊個 mock / level 睇返
lock vs semaphore L6 唔少題兩樣一齊出，所以要硬分。lock 係保護同一個 item 唔好比人同時改；semaphore 係限制同時有幾多個 external call 出街。

Bank L6 / TaskQueue L6：先用 lock 做本地檢查同更新，再用 sem 包住 external sleep。

async with self.account_locks[aid]:
    ... local checks / mutate ...

async with sem:
    await asyncio.sleep(0.01)

你個腦要記：lock 管 correctness，sem 管 throughput。

 Bank L6、TaskQueue L6、ChatRoute L6

大約做法：先喺 lock 入面做 existence / balance / status 呢啲本地 check 同 mutate；離開 lock 之後先入 semaphore 做外部 sleep/call。記法：lock 管 correctness，sem 管 throughput。
semaphore + fail-fast 有 max_concurrent，但 invalid item 會喺入閘前就被打走。重點係：check → return 發生喺 async with sem 之前。

Bank / Hashring / DNS：先 check existence / precondition，唔得就直接走；得先入 sem。

if tid not in self.tasks:
    return False
if self.tasks[tid]["status"] != "COMPLETED":
    return False

async with sem:
    await asyncio.sleep(0.01)

你個腦要見到：fail 咗 = 冇 sleep。

 Bank L6、Hotel L6、Hashring L6、ChatRoute L6
FS L6、Leaderboard L6、Session L6、Scheduler L6
DNS L6、Permission L6、LoadBal L6、TaskQueue L6
Workflow L6、PkgMgr L6、Chat L6、Gym L6

大約做法：先將所有 invalid rule 放喺 async with sem 之前。即係：check existence / readiness / bandwidth，fail 就即刻 return False；只有 valid item 先入 semaphore，再 sleep / simulate external call。
extra precheck / invalid rule 同樣都係 fail-fast，但每個 domain 可以多自己嗰條 invalid rule。見到 bandwidth、empty、ready、has enough data 呢類句要特別小心。

ChatRoute L6：比 Hashring 多一個 bandwidth check。

if self._total_size(source) < bandwidth_mb:
    return False

Chat L6：sync messages 會 fail-fast on empty。

if not messages:
    return False
 ChatRoute L6、Chat L6、DNS L6
semaphore + all-sleep 都有 max_concurrent，但 invalid item 都要照樣入 sem、照樣 sleep、照樣模擬一次，之後先回報失敗。

Notification / PubSub / LogAgg：失敗都要當做「試過 call」。

async with sem:
    await asyncio.sleep(0.01)
    if alert_id not in self.alerts:
        return "failed:" + alert_id

你個腦要見到：fail 咗都照 sleep。

 InMemDB L6、Notification L6、PubSub L6、LogAgg L6

大約做法：每個 item 都先 async with sem，再 await sleep；sleep 完先 check 存唔存在 / 合唔合格，所以就算 fail 都算做過一次外部 call。記法：all-sleep = 先排隊、先瞓，再講成功定失敗。
snapshot before await 外部 call 前，先記低「而家呢一刻要處理邊啲人 / item」。唔好 await 完先再去讀 shared state。

PubSub L6：先 snapshot subscribers，再逐個 push。

subscribers = list(self.topics[topic_id]["subscribers"])

你個腦要記：一入 async external flow，最好 freeze 現場。

 PubSub L6、Notification L6、LogAgg L6
per-item result shape 唔少 L6 唔係返一個大 bool，而係每個 input 自己一個結果。見到 return a list of ...、sent:id、failed:id 呢類字就要醒。

TaskQueue L6：按 input index 回填 True/False。

results = [None] * len(task_ids)
results[index] = True  # or False

Notification L6：每個 alert_id 返 "sent:id" / "failed:id"。

 TaskQueue L6、Notification L6、PubSub L6
lifecycle dispatch 唔止係 call 外部 API，仲要記前後狀態：開始做、外部 call、成功 / 失敗點收尾。

TaskQueue L6：mark processing → external dispatch → completed / failed。

mark_started(...)
result = await dispatch_func(...)
mark_done(...)  # or mark_failed(...)

Workflow L6：同一味，但 step / workflow 名字唔同。

 TaskQueue L6、Workflow L6、PkgMgr L6、OrderBook L6

大約做法：先 mark_started / 改 status 做緊；再 await dispatch_func(...)；成功就 mark_done，失敗就 mark_failed；最後按 input index 填返 result。即係唔只係 call API，而係前後成段 lifecycle 都要補齊。
L6 最先分唔係 code，而係規則：`fail-fast` 定 `all-sleep`？之後再睇有冇 `extra precheck`、要唔要 `snapshot before await`，同埋有冇 `lifecycle dispatch`。

最實用嘅 run 法： `L1` 先認骨架，`L2` 認 scan/sort，`L3` 專分 time-based variants，`L4` 睇 restore / deps，`L5` 睇 lock shape，`L6` 睇 fail-fast / all-sleep。你而家係可以直接照呢頁由上掃到落。

Domain Test — spec 片段練手

用法：左邊當真 spec 咁睇，右邊只睇 3 行。`先判`、`signal`、`點解`。你要練到睇左邊 10 秒內自己都講到右邊。

下面分兩層： 上面係短 spec，幫你快分 domain。下面係長 spec，語氣刻意寫到更似 CodeSignal progressive 題。

注意： 呢啲係 synthetic mock，唔係 leaked 原文。語氣主要參考公開 CodeSignal progressive docs 同 1Point3Acres 上面公開到嘅 Anthropic / cloud storage / in-memory DB 摘要。

Mock Spec答案
You are building a request router for a pool of servers arranged on a circular track.
Each request hashes to a position. Walk clockwise to find the first server.
Later levels add replicas, memory limits, and eviction of least recently used requests.

先判： Hashring / ChatRoute family

Signal： circular track, hashes to a position, clockwise

點解： 呢幾個字一出，就已經係 ring routing。後面再加 memory limits 同 eviction，即係 ChatRoute / capacity delta。

 
Implement a record store keyed by key, where each record contains multiple field -> value pairs.
At a later level, writes may expire after a TTL.
A field is valid only before its expiry timestamp.
Restore should recover the latest snapshot and preserve remaining lifetime correctly.

先判： InMemDB family

Signal： key, field -> value, TTL, expiry timestamp, restore

點解： key + field 直接話畀你知係 nested dict。valid only before expiry 即 inline TTL。preserve remaining lifetime 就係 InMemDB / DNS 嗰種 L4 restore with TTL recalc。

 
You are building a task processing system.
Tasks begin queued, may move to processing, completed, failed, or retry scheduled.
Some tasks cannot start until all dependencies are completed.
An async method simulates num_workers pulling work concurrently from the queue.

先判： TaskQueue / Workflow family

Signal： queued, processing, failed, retry scheduled, dependencies, num_workers

點解： 呢條題核心唔係 CRUD，係 state transition。再加 num_workers，就代表後面會出 worker pool 型嘅並發。

 
You are building a storage system for files.
Files can be copied from one name to another.
A later level adds expiration.
Another level assigns files to users with capacity constraints.

先判： FileSystem family，base 近 Bank，但後面有 Inventory 味

Signal： files, copied from one name to another, expiration, users with capacity

點解： 一開始係 flat dict。copied from one name to another 提醒你之後 L5 可能變 pair-lock。capacity constraints 係後加嘅 delta。

 
You are building a notification dispatcher.
Each notification must call an external API with a concurrency limit.
Even if the target user does not exist, the API attempt must still be simulated for audit logging.

先判： L6 all-sleep pattern

Signal： external API, concurrency limit, must still be simulated

點解： 呢條題最值錢嘅唔係 domain 名，而係最後一句。佢清楚講咗 invalid item 都要照 simulate，所以係 all-sleep。

 
You are building a workflow engine.
A step may be started only when it is ready.
Execution includes: mark started, call an external service, then mark completed.
If the external call fails, return an error result for that step without blocking others.

先判： Workflow family，L6 lifecycle / dispatch 味

Signal： step, ready, mark started, mark completed, without blocking others

點解： 呢條題係一個 step 嘅生命週期。佢著重「開始 → 外部 call → 完成 / error」，所以比普通 batch 更似 lifecycle / dispatch。

用法： 你如果做完一輪，仲係分唔清，就只睇每題嘅 Signal 行，逼自己用 1 句講返點解。

Long-Form Mocks — 更似 CodeSignal prose

呢批特登寫長少少，模擬你入場時會先見到 1-2 段背景，再見到 Part / Level 要求。

Long Mock Spec答案
Problem Overview
Your task is to implement a routing layer for an internal chat platform. Each incoming request must be assigned to a server responsible for processing it. Servers are arranged on a circular hash space, and requests should be routed based on the hashed position of their request IDs.

The system is progressive. In the initial part, you only need to register servers and route requests by walking clockwise on the ring until you find the first eligible server. In later parts, the platform introduces virtual nodes to improve balance, per-server memory limits measured in MB, and request eviction when a server would exceed its capacity. All previously supported behavior must continue to work after each extension.

先判： Hashring / ChatRoute family

Signal： circular hash space, walking clockwise on the ring, virtual nodes, memory limits measured in MB

點解： 前半已經係 consistent hashing。後半再加 memory limits 同 eviction，即係 Hashring base 上面加 ChatRoute delta。

 
Problem Overview
Your task is to implement a simplified in-memory database. The database stores records identified by a string key. Each record may contain multiple field -> value pairs, where both field and value are strings.

Level 1 adds basic set, get, and delete operations. Level 2 adds scan and scan-by-prefix queries that must return results in sorted order. Level 3 introduces timestamp-aware writes and TTL, so a field is considered valid only during its active lifetime. Level 4 adds backup and restore, and restored fields must keep the correct remaining TTL rather than their original expiration time.

先判： InMemDB family

Signal： key, field -> value pairs, scan-by-prefix, TTL, remaining TTL

點解： 呢個幾乎就係公開 InMemDB 類題目嘅語氣。`key + field` 代表 nested dict；`remaining TTL` 直接指向 L4 restore with TTL recalc。

 
Problem Overview
You are building a DNS-like record store for an internal service discovery system. Each domain name may have multiple records associated with it, and callers should be able to resolve the active value for a hostname at a given timestamp.

The first part focuses on adding and retrieving records. A later part adds wildcard matching and prefix-like lookup over records that share the same domain root. Another part introduces TTL-based expiration: a record is active only before its expiry timestamp. In the final part, the system must restore from previously saved snapshots while preserving the remaining lifetime of each active record.

先判： DNS family

Signal： domain name, resolve, wildcard matching, TTL-based expiration, remaining lifetime

點解： 本質仍然係 InMemDB 骨架，但 business words 換成 DNS。`domain + record + resolve` 係第一個 signal；`remaining lifetime` 話畀你知 restore 規則都係同一類。

 
Requirements
Your task is to implement a simple cloud storage system that maps objects (files) to their metainformation. The system is entirely in-memory: you do not need to interact with a real filesystem.

Part 1 supports adding, reading, and deleting files. Part 2 supports searching for files and returning the largest matching files. Part 3 introduces users with storage limits, and file operations must respect the user's remaining capacity. In a later part, files may be copied or transformed while keeping all previous search and quota behavior correct.

先判： FileSystem / Cloud Storage family

Signal： maps objects (files) to their metainformation, largest matching files, users with storage limits, copied

點解： 呢個 opening 語氣係公開 cloud storage 類摘要真係會見到。骨架係 flat dict，但 copied 代表後面可能出 pair-lock；storage limits 係 user-capacity delta。

 
Problem Overview
You are implementing a task processing service for asynchronous jobs. Every task starts in a queued state and may later move to processing, completed, failed, or retry-scheduled. Some tasks depend on the successful completion of other tasks before they can begin.

In the early parts, implement task creation, status inspection, and valid state transitions. Later parts add retry delays, dependency checks, and the ability to dispatch work concurrently using a fixed number of workers. The dispatch API should simulate workers pulling tasks from the queue rather than spawning an unlimited coroutine per task.

先判： TaskQueue family

Signal： queued, processing, failed, retry-scheduled, depend on, fixed number of workers

點解： 關鍵唔係 CRUD，而係 state transition。最後一句直頭講埋 worker pool shape，呢個就同普通 batch gather 分開咗。

 
Problem Overview
You are building a workflow engine that coordinates multi-step operations. Each step has its own status and can only begin once it is marked ready. Executing a step consists of updating its state, invoking an external action, and then recording the final result.

The first parts focus on creating workflows and moving a step through valid transitions. Later parts add dependency tracking between steps and a dispatch operation that may execute several ready steps concurrently. If a particular external action fails, that step should return an error result without blocking unrelated ready steps from continuing.

先判： Workflow family

Signal： multi-step operations, marked ready, updating its state, external action, unrelated ready steps

點解： 呢個比 TaskQueue 更似 lifecycle orchestration。重點係一個 step 嘅生命週期，同埋 dispatch ready steps。

 
Requirements
Implement an inventory service for a network of warehouses. Each warehouse tracks the items currently assigned to it and has a maximum storage capacity. Items may be added, removed, reassigned, or transferred between warehouses.

Early parts focus on basic CRUD and reporting total quantities. Later parts add filtered scans, capacity enforcement, and operations that update two warehouses atomically. In the concurrency part, multiple transfers may happen at the same time, so the implementation must avoid race conditions and deadlocks.

先判： Inventory / Multi-collection family

Signal： network of warehouses, assigned, transferred between warehouses, update two warehouses atomically

點解： 一見到兩個 warehouse 同時改，你就應該由 single-key 轉去 pair-lock 思維。呢類唔係單 record 題，係 multi-collection。

 
Problem Overview
You are building a notification dispatcher that sends outbound requests to a third-party API. The API has a concurrency limit, so only a bounded number of requests may be in flight at the same time.

Each dispatch attempt should produce a result entry. Some targets may be invalid or missing, but the assessment requires every attempt to still be simulated for audit purposes. In other words, invalid items should not be skipped before the rate-limited section if the specification says the call must still be attempted.

先判： L6 all-sleep pattern

Signal： third-party API, concurrency limit, every attempt to still be simulated, should not be skipped

點解： 呢條最重要唔係 domain，而係最後嗰句 toggle。佢明講 invalid item 唔可以 fail-fast，要入 semaphore 條路。

 
Problem Overview
You are implementing a reservation system for a hotel. Each room may be occupied by at most one guest at a time, and bookings may later be upgraded, canceled, or checked out. The system should return formatted views of current reservations and preserve backward compatibility as new features are added.

In the first part, support creating and canceling bookings. In later parts, add sorted listing views and deferred actions that are only applied when the relevant booking is touched again. A future part introduces room upgrades, where one guest may move from one room to another while preserving the consistency of both room records.

先判： Hotel family

Signal： room, guest, bookings, checked out, upgrades

點解： 開頭係 flat dict + lazy helper 味。到 upgrades 就要留意之後可能唔再係單 record，會變雙邊更新。

最似真場景嘅練法： 先只睇 long mock 左邊第一段。未睇 Part 1/2/3 前，先估 family。之後再睇後面 levels，先估 L3 / L5 / L6 variant。

5 大類 × 19 個 Domain

每類第一個詳細學，之後嘅 fast drill（focus 唔同嘅 20-30%）。望住呢個圖去讀。

Group A: Flat Dict + Lazy Helper
base = Bank ✅ 已學

  Bank ✅ ─────── 已詳細學
  Hotel ✅ ────── 已詳細學（唔同：booking ID, upgrade 搬人）
  File System ── 已有 tab（唔同：copy_file 覆蓋 dest）
  Leaderboard ── fast drill（唔同：score decay 定時扣分）
  Notification ─ fast drill（唔同：auto-escalate severity）
  Session Mgr ── fast drill（唔同：max concurrent sessions per user）
  Event Sched ── fast drill（唔同：recurring events）
Group B: Nested Dict + Inline TTL
base = InMemDB ✅ 已學

  InMemDB ✅ ─── 已詳細學
  DNS/Routing ── fast drill（唔同：wildcard matching *.example.com）
  Permission ─── fast drill（唔同：role inheritance）
Group C: Ring/Routing + Capacity
base = Hashring 🔄 而家學緊

  Hashring 🔄 ── 而家學緊
  Load Balancer ─ fast drill（唔同：round-robin, weighted, health check）
  LRU Cache ──── fast drill（唔同：成個 system 都係 cache + eviction）
Group D: State Machine + Dependencies
base = TaskQueue ⚠️ 要詳細學（最多新 pattern）

  TaskQueue ──── 要詳細學（state machine, backoff, DAG, worker pool）
  Workflow ───── fast drill（唔同：multi-step rollback）
  Package Mgr ── fast drill（唔同：dependency tree）
  Order Book ─── fast drill（唔同：buy/sell matching）
Group E: Multi-Collection
base = Inventory ⚠️ 要詳細學

  Inventory ──── 要詳細學（items + warehouses, transfer, computed metric）
  Pub-Sub ────── fast drill（唔同：topic + subscriber + offset）
  Chat System ── fast drill（唔同：channel + thread + unread）
  Log Aggregator  fast drill（唔同：level filter + aggregate count）

學習順序


 步驟    做咩                          狀態
─────────────────────────────────────────────
  1     Bank（Group A base）           ✅ 已學
  2     Hotel（Group A drill）         ✅ 已學
  3     InMemDB（Group B base）        ✅ 已學
  4     Hashring（Group C base）       🔄 而家
  5     TaskQueue（Group D base）      ⏳ 下一個
  6     Inventory（Group E base）      ⏳ 之後
─────────────────────────────────────────────
  7+    所有 fast drill（13 個）        ⏳ agents 出緊
        讀 spec + 讀 code = 每個 5-10 min
        唔寫 code，只睇 pattern

每類嘅核心分別


 Group │ Data 結構      │ L3 TTL 點做     │ L4 特色           │ L6 類型
───────┼────────────────┼─────────────────┼───────────────────┼──────────
   A   │ flat dict      │ lazy helper     │ merge/history     │ fail-fast
       │ data[id]={..}  │ 真刪            │ deepcopy backup   │
───────┼────────────────┼─────────────────┼───────────────────┼──────────
   B   │ nested dict    │ inline check    │ backup +          │ all-sleep
       │ data[k][f]={.} │ 唔真刪          │ remaining_ttl     │
───────┼────────────────┼─────────────────┼───────────────────┼──────────
   C   │ ring + routing │ capacity        │ LRU eviction      │ fail-fast
       │ positions list │ 唔係 TTL        │                   │
───────┼────────────────┼─────────────────┼───────────────────┼──────────
   D   │ flat dict +    │ state machine   │ DAG dependencies  │ fail-fast
       │ status field   │ + backoff       │                   │
───────┼────────────────┼─────────────────┼───────────────────┼──────────
   E   │ 多個 dict      │ lazy helper     │ cross-collection  │ 混合
       │ items+places   │                 │ transfer          │

__init__ / Data Structure Variants

# ── Variant 1: Flat dict（一層）──
# 用喺：Bank, Hotel, FS, Hashring, TaskQueue, Inventory
# 一個 key 對一個 dict
self.data = {}  # 開主表；之後每個 entity 都靠個 key 掛喺呢度
# data["alice"] = {"balance": 500, "outgoing": 100}
# data["r1"]    = {"price": 100, "guest": "Alice"}
# ── Variant 2: Nested dict（兩層）──
# 用喺：InMemDB
# 一個 key 入面有好多 fields，每個 field 有 value + expiry
self.data = {}  # 先開外層殼；第二層 field 之後先逐格塞入去
# data["user1"]["name"]    = {"value": "alice", "expiry": None}
# data["user1"]["session"] = {"value": "abc",   "expiry": 60}
# ── 全部 mock 都有嘅 init ──
def __init__(self):
    self.data = {}                                   # 主倉庫；大部分 CRUD 都係摸呢格
    self.counter = 0                                # 自動編號器；要派 booking/payment id 就靠佢遞增
    self.pending = {}                               # 待處理區；到鐘先做嘅嘢會先擺喺呢度等
    self.backups = []                               # 快照相簿；L4 影相同還原都喺呢度攞
    self.locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)            # 每條 key 自己一把鎖；async 線撞埋嚟都唔會互踩

L1 — CRUD Variants

Spec 嘅字眼話你知用邊個 variant。

# ── Variant 1: 重複 reject（最常見）──
# Spec: "Returns False if exists"
# 用喺：Bank create_account, FS add_file, Hotel add_room
if id in self.data:  # 門口先擋重複；同名 key 唔畀開第二格
    return False  # 照 spec 回覆 caller：今次冇開成
self.data[id] = {...}  # 真正開新格；之後所有讀寫都靠呢個 key 入去
return True
# 開倉成功，外面可以當佢存在 
# ── Variant 2: 重複覆蓋 ──
# Spec: "If exists, overwrite"
# 用喺：InMemDB set（永遠覆蓋，唔 return）
self.data[key][field] = {...}
# 唔問舊值，成格蓋過；好似新貼紙直接遮住舊貼紙 
# ── Variant 3: 重複累加 ──
# Spec: "If exists, ADD to quantity"
# 用喺：Inventory add_item
if id in self.data:  # 有舊貨就唔另開格，直接喺原位加上去
    self.data[id]["qty"] += qty  # 舊數量疊新數量；個倉越堆越高
else:  # 第一次見到呢個 id
    self.data[id] = {"qty": qty}
# 冇舊貨就先開第一格，當起始存貨 
# ── Variant 4: Return ID ──
# Spec: "Returns booking_id" / "Returns payment_id"
# 用喺：Hotel book_room, Bank pay
self.counter += 1  # 先推個號碼機一步；確保今次編號同上次唔撞
id = f"booking{self.counter}"  # 用固定 prefix + 流水號砌出一個可追蹤嘅單號
return id
# 將新單號交返畀 caller；之後查單就靠佢 
# ── Variant 5: Return new value ──
# Spec: "Returns new balance"
# 用喺：Bank deposit
acc["balance"] += amount  # 先改戶口入面嗰個真數；唔好另外維持第二份影子值
return acc["balance"]
# 即場答返最新餘額；caller 唔使再多查一次 
# ── Variant 6: Return None on fail ──
# Spec: "Returns None if insufficient funds" / "Returns None if not found"
# 用喺：Bank transfer, Bank deposit
if id not in self.data:  # 入口已經斷線；再做落去只會越改越錯
    return None
# 用 None 表示「今次冇答案」，唔係數值 0 
# ── Variant 7: Return "" on fail ──
# Spec: "Returns empty string if not found"
# 用喺：InMemDB get
if key not in self.data:  # 搵唔到嗰格；spec 要你交空殼唔係交 None
    return ""
# 空字串即係「查過，但個位係空白」

L2 — Sort / Search Variants

# ── Variant 1: Top N desc by value, asc by name tie ──
# Spec: "top N by outgoing/revenue/score descending, ties alphabetical"
# 用喺：Bank top_spenders, Hotel top_rooms
items = []  # 先拉一張排行榜草稿；未排序前所有人都堆喺呢度
for id, entry in self.data.items():  # 行晒主表，逐個抽出「名字 + 用嚟比大小嘅分數」
    items.append((id, entry["metric"]))  # 將比較所需資料壓平做 tuple，方便一次 sort
items.sort(key=lambda x: (-x[1], x[0]))  # 先比分數高低；同分再用名字決定先後，避免結果飄嚟飄去
result = []  # 正式輸出另一張 list；只留頭 N 個
for id, val in items[:n]:  # 排完之後先切頭 N 個，唔好未排就亂截
    result.append(f"{id}({val})")  # 砌成 spec 要嘅展示字串，方便直接對答案
return result                              # 交返排好嘅名單；caller 唔使再加工
# ── Variant 2: Sorted fields join string ──
# Spec: "Return as field(value), field(value)"
# 用喺：InMemDB scan
fields = sorted(self.data[key])          # 先將 field 名排好；之後 scan 先會穩定，每次答案都同一個次序
parts = []  # 零件箱；每個 field 先砌成一小段字
for f in fields:  # 順住排好嘅 field 行，避免 dict 原生順序搞亂答案
    parts.append(f"{f}({self.data[key][f]['value']})")  # 將 field 同 value 綁埋，變成可直接展示嘅一塊
return ", ".join(parts)                  # 最後用逗號串成一條線；好似將珠仔逐粒穿埋一齊
# ── Variant 3: Prefix filter ──
# Spec: "starts with prefix"
# 用喺：InMemDB scan_by_prefix
for f in self.data[key]:  # 行晒成排 field 名，好似逐塊招牌睇字頭
    if f.startswith(prefix):  # 只收字頭啱嘅；prefix 就係入場券
        fields.append(f)
# 合格先放入候選名單；之後再統一排序/格式化 
# ── Variant 4: Range filter ──
# Spec: "balance between min and max"
# 用喺：Bank accounts_in_range
if min_val <= entry["balance"] <= max_val:  # 呢格數值要夾喺左右兩條欄杆中間先算過關
    result.append(id)
# 收下呢個 id；最後 caller 要嘅通常係名單唔係完整資料 
# ── Variant 5: Computed metric ──
# Spec: "ranked by value = qty * price"
# 用喺：Inventory, Hotel revenue_per_night
metric = entry["qty"] * entry["price"]  # 真正用嚟比賽嘅唔係原欄位，而係現場算出嚟嘅綜合分
items.sort(key=lambda x: (-x[1], x[0]))
# 有咗 metric 先跟返標準排行榜骨架去排

L3 — TTL / Scheduled Variants

# ── Variant 1: Lazy helper（真刪）──
# Spec: "cashback deposited 24 hours later" / "late fee applied after checkout"
# 用喺：Bank cashback, Hotel late_fee
# 每個 method 第一行 call helper，helper 真正 delete/apply 到期嘅嘢
def _process_pending(self, timestamp):  # lazy 清單員；有人入門口先順手巡一次到期格
    for item in self.pending:  # 行晒待辦區，逐件睇而家係咪到鐘
        if timestamp >= item["due_time"]:  # 時間追到 due_time 先真係落手做
            # apply 呢個 event（加錢、扣錢等）
            item["done"] = True  # 標記做完；下次巡樓唔好再重複算多次

# 每個 public method 第一行：
self._process_pending(timestamp)
# 每次入正門先巡一轉，確保後面見到嘅資料已經追到最新時間 
# ── Variant 2: Inline TTL check（唔真刪）──
# Spec: "field expires after ttl" / "alive when ts < ts + ttl"
# 用喺：InMemDB, FS TTL files
# 唔 call helper，每次 check 嗰陣先跳過死嘅
def _is_alive(self, field_data, timestamp):  # 守門員；每次有人讀先臨場判生死
    if field_data["expiry"] is None:  # 冇 expiry 即係長住證；永遠唔會畀人趕走
        return True  # 直接放行
    if timestamp < field_data["expiry"]:    # 仲未到界線；留意大部分題用嚴格小於
        return True  # 仲生勾勾，可以畀 caller 睇到
    return False
# 到鐘就當死；唔使真刪都要當佢透明 
# ── Variant 3: Recurring scheduled（多次觸發）──
# Spec: "every N seconds, deduct amount, count times"
# 用喺：Bank schedule_recurring, Hotel scheduled_discount
def _process_recurring(self, timestamp):  # 巡 recurring 清單；一個 subscription 可能要補做幾次
    for sub in self.subscriptions.values():  # 逐條訂閱睇，邊條到鐘就處理邊條
        while sub["count"] > 0 and timestamp >= sub["next_due"]:  # 卡住太耐時，要用 while 補返漏咗嘅每一期
            # apply 一次（扣錢等）
            sub["next_due"] += sub["interval"]  # 日曆向後推一格；約下一次時間
            sub["count"] -= 1
# 次數存貨扣一件；扣到 0 就唔再排 
# ── TTL boundary 口訣 ──
# "strictly less than" → ts < expiry（到期嗰秒算死）
# "less than or equal" → ts <= expiry（到期嗰秒仲活）
# 大部分題用 strictly less than

L4 — Backup / History / Merge Variants

# ── Variant 1: Backup deepcopy（冇 TTL）──
# Spec: "snapshot the state" / "backup and restore"
# 用喺：Bank, Hotel, FS（冇 TTL 嘅題）
import copy

def backup(self, timestamp):  # 影快照；將而家個倉原封不動封箱
    state = copy.deepcopy(self.data)  # 深拷貝先真係似影相；之後原倉再郁都唔會穿返落張相
    self.backups.append((timestamp, state))  # 將時間戳同張相一齊收埋，之後先知揀邊個版本
    return len(self.data)  # 常見 spec 會要你答當刻有幾多格資料

def restore(self, timestamp, backup_timestamp):  # 時光機模式；搵目標時間之前最近嗰張相
    best = None  # 暫存目前最貼近目標時間嘅候選快照
    for ts, state in self.backups:  # 快照相簿逐張翻；唔係第一張啱就即停
        if ts <= backup_timestamp:  # 只可以揀目標時間或之前嘅版本；之後嘅未來相唔算
            if best is None or ts > best[0]:  # 候選入面揀最新嗰張，咁先最貼近目標時刻
                best = (ts, state)  # 更新為而家手上最好嘅版本
    if best is None:  # 一張都揀唔到，代表根本冇合資格快照
        return False  # 還原失敗；唔好亂清現況
    self.data = copy.deepcopy(best[1])  # 用深拷貝重建現況；避免改到相簿原件
    return True
# 時光機落地成功；主倉庫已回到舊版本 
# ── Variant 2: Backup with remaining_ttl（有 TTL）──
# Spec: "store remaining lifespan" / "recalculate TTL on restore"
# 用喺：InMemDB
# 睇 InMemDB tab 嘅 L4，太長唔重複
# ── Variant 3: History query ──
# Spec: "balance at time_at" / "value at historical timestamp"
# 用喺：Bank get_balance
for ts, val in reversed(entry["history"]):  # 由最新往回掃；通常最近嗰筆最快中
    if ts <= time_at:  # 第一筆唔晏過目標時間嘅，就係當時世界線應有嘅值
        return val
# 直接交返歷史瞬間嘅答案；唔使再望更舊記錄 
# ── Variant 4: Merge ──
# Spec: "merge A into B" / "combine balances" / "redirect pending"
# 用喺：Bank merge_accounts, FS merge_users
acc1["balance"] += acc2["balance"]       # 先將 source 錢包倒落 dest；值要先搬，唔好未搬就刪
del self.data[id2]                        # 搬完就拆 source 嗰間房；之後全世界只認 dest
# ── Variant 5: Upgrade（搬 entity）──
# Spec: "move guest from room A to room B"
# 用喺：Hotel upgrade_room
to_room["guest"] = from_room["guest"]   # 先將人搬去新房；唔好中途搞到兩邊都空
from_room["guest"] = ""                  # 舊房清空，代表 upgrade 已經正式生效

L5 — Concurrent Batch Variants

# ── Variant 1: Lock 1 個 key（最常見）──
# Spec: 操作只涉及 1 個 key
# 用喺：InMemDB set/get/delete, Bank deposit/pay, Hotel book/checkout
async def execute_op(op):  # 處理單一 op（async inner function）
    key = op["key"]  # 先認清今次係郁邊格資料；鎖都係按呢個門牌去攞
    async with self.locks[key]:  # 關門先做；同一條 key 嘅 op 要排隊，先後次序先穩
        return self.method(...)
# 真正工作交返俾同步 method；鎖只負責保護入口 
# ── Variant 2: Lock 2 個 key（sorted 防 deadlock）──
# Spec: 操作涉及 2 個 key（transfer, upgrade, copy）
# 用喺：Bank transfer, Hotel upgrade, FS copy
keys = sorted([key1, key2])              # 先排門牌號；所有人都照同一方向鎖門，先唔會你等我我等你
async with self.locks[keys[0]]:  # 先鎖細門牌；呢步就係統一規矩
    async with self.locks[keys[1]]:  # 再鎖第二把；到呢度先算正式攞齊兩邊控制權
        return self.method(...)
# 兩邊都安全先搬資料；做完先一齊放鎖 
# ── Variant 3: Worker pool ──
# Spec: "N workers process a queue" / "num_workers"
# 用喺：TaskQueue run_workers
async def run_workers(self, num_workers):  # 開 N 個 worker 並發做單
    lock = asyncio.Lock()  # 共用總閘；邊個 worker 攞 task / 改 status 都要經呢度

    async def worker():  # worker coroutine — 一個工人反覆攞單、做單、交單
        # 第一步：喺共用 queue 度安全拎一張 ready task
        while True:  # 只要仲有單，工人就一直轉
            async with lock:                     # 先鎖住 queue；避免兩個工人攞中同一張單
                task = self._get_next_ready()    # 抽下一張可以做嘅單；未 ready 嘅先唔郁
                if task is None:                  # 抽唔到代表成個池暫時冇工開
                    return                           # 呢個 worker 收工；唔好空轉燒 CPU
                self._mark_processing(task)      # 先插支旗：呢張單已經有人接咗，其他 worker 唔好再碰
            # 第二步：放開大閘後先做工，等其他 worker 可以同時攞下一張單
            await asyncio.sleep(0.01)            # 呢度只係模擬實際工作時間；真 code 可能係 I/O 或 heavy work
            # 第三步：返嚟更新 status，話俾世界知張單已經完工
            async with lock:                     # status update 亦都要鎖；避免完成標記互相踩爛
                self._mark_completed(task)      # 收尾蓋章；之後其他流程先會見到呢張單已完成

    tasks = []  # 工人名單；先召集晒 coroutine，再一齊開工
    for _ in range(num_workers):
        tasks.append(worker())
    await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
# ── 點分用邊個 ──
# spec 講 "process these operations" → gather（Variant 1 或 2）
# spec 講 "N workers" / "worker pool" → Variant 3
# 操作涉及 2 個 key → Variant 2

L6 — Rate Limited Variants

# ── Variant 1: Fail-fast ──
# Spec: "failed should return False WITHOUT simulating"
#       "skip missing without I/O"
# 用喺：Bank process_external, Hotel send_notifications, FS sync_files
#
# invalid request → 即 return False，唔入 sem，唔 sleep
# 20 個 invalid，total time ≈ 0s
async def process_external(self, timestamp, requests, max_concurrent):  # 並發處理外部 request（semaphore）
    sem = asyncio.Semaphore(max_concurrent)  # 外部閘口；同一時間只畀 N 張 request 真正出街

    async def do_one(req):  # 處理單一 item
        # 第一步：先喺本地驗身；唔合格嘅 request 唔好浪費外部名額
        async with self.locks[req["id"]]:        # 先鎖住本地資料，避免 validate 同 mutate 中間被第二條線插隊
            if not self._is_valid(req):        # validate 唔過就即刻出局；連排隊都唔使排
                return False                     # fail-fast 嘅核心：即走，唔 sleep
            self._mutate(req)                    # 本地 state 先改好；之後外部 call 只係通知/同步
        # 第二步：合格先去搶外部閘口
        async with sem:                          # acquire 到名額先可以出街；唔會一窩蜂打爆外部系統
            await asyncio.sleep(0.01)            # 呢段 sleep 就係模擬真正外部 I/O 時間
        return True  # 本地過關、外部又做完，今單先算真成功

    tasks = []  # coroutine 清單；逐單包好再一次過 gather
    for r in requests:  # 行 input 順序，保證 gather 結果對得返原單
        tasks.append(do_one(r))  # 先掛起等跑；呢刻仲未真正執行
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)  # 全部一齊開跑；有效 request 先會去爭 semaphore
    return list(results)
# gather 交返 tuple/list-like 結果；轉正規 list 比 caller 食 
# ── Variant 2: All-sleep ──
# Spec: "scan all keys" / "every request must attempt the API"
#       冇講 "skip" 或 "without simulating"
# 用喺：InMemDB batch_scan
#
# 全部 request 都入 sem、都 sleep，冇 skip
# 20 個 invalid，total time ≈ 0.2s（全部都 sleep）
async def batch_scan(self, keys, max_concurrent):  # 批量 scan（semaphore）
    sem = asyncio.Semaphore(max_concurrent)  # 外部窗口得 N 個位；但今次人人都要排隊入去

    async def do_one(key):  # 處理單一 item
        # 第一步：唔好預先 check；spec 要求每條 request 都要真係走一轉外部流程
        async with sem:                          # 無論 key 靚唔靚都一律排隊入窗口；呢個就係 all-sleep 精神
            await asyncio.sleep(0.01)            # 人人都要瞓一陣；就算最後查到空都照樣消耗時間
            return (key, self.scan(key))       # 真正答案由 scan 自己判；helper 只負責排隊同節流

    tasks = []  # coroutine 籃；每條 key 先包裝成一個待跑工作
    for k in keys:  # 每個 key 都要做，冇人可以 fail-fast 甩身
        tasks.append(do_one(k))  # 放入待跑清單；順序之後會由 gather 幫你保住
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)  # 逐批入窗口；就算 invalid key 亦照樣排隊 + sleep
    return dict(results)                         # 最後重砌成 dict；方便 key 對 answer 直接查表
# ── 點分用邊個 ──
# spec 講 "skip" / "without simulating" / "failed should not sleep" → fail-fast
# spec 冇講 skip / 講 "all keys" / "every request" → all-sleep

背景：Bank System 係乜

一個銀行系統：建 account → 存錢 → 轉賬 → 付款 → 排名 → 歷史查詢 → 合併 → 並行處理。

# Bank = 最基本嘅 dict-of-dicts 系統
# 核心 data structure：
self.accounts = {}   # account_id → {balance, outgoing, history}
self.payment = {}    # payment_id → {account_id, cashback_amount, ...}

# 每個 method 第一個 param 都係 timestamp
# L3 開始每個 method 開頭都 call self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)

# Level 進程：
# L1: CRUD（建/存/轉）
# L2: Sort/Filter/Format（排名）
# L3: Timestamp/TTL/Lazy（付款 + cashback）
# L4: Backup/Merge/History（歷史查詢 + 合併）
# L5: Concurrent Batch（async gather + lock）
# L6: Rate Limited External（+ semaphore）
# Bank 同其他 system 嘅分別：
# Bank 用 dict-of-dicts（accounts 入面又係 dict）
# Hashring 用 dict + list（nodes 入面有 positions list）
# Hotel 用 dict + set（rooms 用 set 記邊日 booked）
#
# Bank 嘅特色：
# 1. 每個 method 都有 timestamp param
# 2. L3 開始有 lazy processing（_process_cashbacks）
# 3. transfer 涉及兩個 account → L5 要 lock 兩個
# 4. 所有數值操作都用 integer（唔用 float）
#
# accounts 實際樣子：
# {
#   "alice": {"balance": 500, "outgoing": 100, "history": [(1,0), (3,500)]},
#   "bob":   {"balance": 200, "outgoing": 0,   "history": [(2,0), (4,200)]}
# }
#
# 每個 account 有三個 field：
# balance  = 而家有幾多錢（int）
# outgoing = 總共轉/付咗幾多出去（int，排名用）
# history  = [(timestamp, balance), ...] 每次改完 balance 都 append
黃底 = skeleton，直接抄，唔使改
# 右邊 inline comment 會好似咁，直接講白呢行實際做乜 灰色斜體 = 因應題目改嘅部分（Bank System 做例子）

__init__（完整 class 開頭）

import asyncio                               # L5 async 用
import copy                                   # L4 deepcopy 用
import bisect                                 # 有啲題 binary search 用
from collections import defaultdict           # L5 auto-create lock 用

class BankSystem:
    def __init__(self):
        self.accounts = {}                  # L1 — account_id → {balance, outgoing, history}
        self.payment_counter = 0        # L3 加 — auto-increment payment ID
        self.payment = {}                # L3 加 — payment_id → {account_id, cashback_amount, ...}
        self.merged_accounts = {}        # L4 加 — old_id → new_id（合併記錄）
        self.account_locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock) # L5 加 — 每個 account 一把鎖

self.accounts 實際樣子：

{
  "alice": {
    "balance": 500,
    "outgoing": 100,
    "history": [(1,0), (3,500)]
  },
  "bob": {
    "balance": 200,
    "outgoing": 0,
    "history": [(2,0), (4,200)]
  }
}

點攞 data：

acc = self.accounts["alice"]
print(acc)
# {"balance": 500, "outgoing": 100, "history": [(1,0),(3,500)]}

bal = acc["balance"]
print(bal)
# 500

acc["balance"] += 100
print(acc["balance"])
# 600
# alice 嘅 balance 真係變咗 600（acc 係 pointer）

bal += 100
print(bal)
# 600
# 但 alice 嘅 balance 仲係 600（bal 係 copy）

Helpers（成個 mock 都用）

# Helper: _process_cashbacks — 每個 method 開頭都 call（L3 開始）
# Lazy processing：唔會自動到期，要等有人 call method 帶 timestamp 入嚟先 check
def _process_cashbacks(self, timestamp):    # 行晒所有 payment，到期嘅入賬
    for pid, p in self.payment.items():     # 逐個 payment 睇
        if not p["received"] and timestamp >= p["cashback_time"]:  # 未收過 + 到期
            self.accounts[p["account_id"]]["balance"] += p["cashback_amount"]  # 到鐘就將回贈重新派返入客人戶口；等於商店而家先找數
            p["received"] = True              # 標記已收（下次唔再入）

_process_cashbacks 嘅職責：

每次有人 call 任何 method 帶 timestamp 入嚟
→ 行晒 self.payment dict
→ 搵未收過 (received=False) + 到期 (timestamp >= cashback_time) 嘅
→ 將 cashback_amount 加返入 account 嘅 balance
→ 標記 received = True

# 點解叫 "lazy"？
# 因為唔係到期就自動入賬
# 要等下一次有人 call method 先 check
# 例如 cashback_time = 100
# 但如果 timestamp=99 call create_account
# → check: 99 < 100 → 唔入賬
# timestamp=101 call deposit
# → check: 101 >= 100 → 入賬！

self.payment 實際樣子：

self.payment = {
    "payment1": {
        "account_id": "alice",
        "cashback_amount": 10,
        "cashback_time": 86401000,
        "received": False
    }
}

L1 — CRUD

建 account，存錢（deposit），轉賬（transfer）。每個 method check 存唔存在 + return 適當嘅值。

create + deposit（完整 example）

def create_account(self, timestamp, account_id):  # 開新戶口
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)     # L3 加：先處理到期嘅 cashback

    if account_id in self.accounts:  # 呢個戶口存唔存在？
        return False  # 已經有 → 拒絕重複建

    self.accounts[account_id] = {  # 開個新戶口，記低資料
        "balance": 0,                    # L1
        "outgoing": 0,                   # L2 加
        "history": [(timestamp, 0)]      # L4 加
    }

    return True  # 開成功
def deposit(self, timestamp, account_id, amount):  # 存錢入戶口
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)     # L3 加：先處理到期嘅 cashback

    if account_id not in self.accounts:  # 戶口唔存在？
        return None  # 搵唔到 → 冇嘢做

    acc = self.accounts[account_id]  # 攞出嚟（pointer，改佢即改原本）
    acc["balance"] += amount  # 加錢入去
    acc["history"].append((timestamp, acc["balance"])) # L4 加

    return acc["balance"]  # 回傳新餘額

create_account(1, "alice") 之後：

self.accounts = {
  "alice": {
    "balance": 0,
    "outgoing": 0,
    "history": [(1, 0)]
  }
}

deposit(2, "alice", 500) 之後：

self.accounts = {
  "alice": {
    "balance": 500,       # 0+500
    "outgoing": 0,
    "history": [(1,0), (2,500)]  # 加咗
  }
}

dict access 常見錯：

d.balance           # 錯 — dot 係 class 用
d["balance"]        # 啱 — dict 用 bracket

d["account_id"]     # 錯 — 搵 literal string
d[account_id]       # 啱 — 用 variable 嘅值

acc = d["alice"]    # pointer，改 acc 改原本
bal = d["alice"]["balance"] # copy，改 bal 唔影響

transfer / 雙 entity 操作（完整 example）

def transfer(self, timestamp, source_id, target_id, amount):  # 由一個戶口轉錢去另一個
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)     # L3 加：先處理到期嘅 cashback

    if source_id not in self.accounts or target_id not in self.accounts:  # 兩個戶口都存在？
        return None  # 有一個唔喺度 → 唔做
    if source_id == target_id:  # 自己轉畀自己？
        return None  # 唔准

    s_acc = self.accounts[source_id]  # 攞 source 戶口（pointer）
    t_acc = self.accounts[target_id]  # 攞 target 戶口（pointer）
    if s_acc["balance"] < amount:  # source 夠唔夠錢？
        return None  # 唔夠 → 唔做

    s_acc["balance"] -= amount  # source 扣錢
    s_acc["outgoing"] += amount            # L2 加
    s_acc["history"].append((timestamp, s_acc["balance"])) # L4 加

    t_acc["balance"] += amount  # target 收錢
    t_acc["history"].append((timestamp, t_acc["balance"])) # L4 加

    return s_acc["balance"]  # 回傳 source 嘅新餘額

transfer(5, "alice", "bob", 200) 之前：

"alice": {"balance": 500, "outgoing": 0}
"bob":   {"balance": 200, "outgoing": 0}

之後：

"alice": {"balance": 300, "outgoing": 200}
"bob":   {"balance": 400, "outgoing": 0}

s_acc = self.accounts["alice"]  # pointer
s_acc["balance"] -= 200         # alice 變 300
t_acc = self.accounts["bob"]    # pointer
t_acc["balance"] += 200         # bob 變 400

Check 順序：

1. 兩個 account 都存在？
2. 唔係同一個？
3. source 夠錢？
→ 全部 pass 先做嘢

L2 — Sort / Filter / Format

排名（top_spenders）：按 outgoing desc 排，同分按名 asc。Return format "name(value)"。

排序 + format（完整 example）

def top_spenders(self, timestamp, n):  # 排頭 N 個花最多錢嘅戶口
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)  # 先處理到期 cashback

    sorted_items = dict(sorted(  # 排序：outgoing 大排先，同分按名 asc
        self.accounts.items(),  # 將全部戶口攤平畀 sorted 排榜；之後先可以揀出 top spenders
        key=lambda x: (-x[1]["outgoing"], x[0])  # -值 = desc，名 = asc
    ))

    result = []  # 準備裝 format 完嘅 string
    for account_id, acc in sorted_items.items():  # 逐個戶口行
        result.append(f"{account_id}({acc['outgoing']})")  # 格式化成 "名(值)"

    return result[:n]  # 淨攞頭 N 個

sorted 點運作：

self.accounts.items() 出嚟嘅 x：
x = ("alice", {"balance":500, "outgoing":300})
x = ("bob",   {"balance":200, "outgoing":100})
x = ("charlie",{"balance":800, "outgoing":300})

x[0] = "alice"         # account name
x[1] = {"balance":500} # 成個 dict
x[1]["outgoing"] = 300 # 攞 outgoing 值

key=lambda x: (-x[1]["outgoing"], x[0])
              #                   #
         -300 排先(desc)    同分按名排(asc)

排完：
(-300, "alice")   # alice 先（a < c）
(-300, "charlie") # charlie 後
(-100, "bob")     # bob 最尾

result = ["alice(300)", "charlie(300)", "bob(100)"]
result[:2] = ["alice(300)", "charlie(300)"]

f-string 點用：

account_id = "alice"
acc["outgoing"] = 300

f"{account_id}({acc['outgoing']})"
# "alice(300)"

L3 — Timestamp / TTL / Lazy Processing

pay 扣錢 + schedule cashback（24h 後自動入賬）。每個 method 開頭 call _process_cashbacks 處理到期嘅。get_payment_status return "IN_PROGRESS" 或 "CASHBACK_RECEIVED"。

Timestamp = 「而家幾點」，數字，大 = 遲
TTL = 幾耐之後過期，expiry = timestamp + ttl
Lazy processing = 唔會自動到期，要等有人 call method 先 check

pay / 建立 scheduled event（完整 example）

def pay(self, timestamp, account_id, amount):  # 付款（觸發 scheduled cashback）
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)  # 先處理到期嘅 cashback

    if account_id not in self.accounts: return None  # 戶口唔存在 → 唔做
    acc = self.accounts[account_id]  # 攞戶口 pointer
    if acc["balance"] < amount: return None  # 唔夠錢 → 唔做

    acc["balance"] -= amount                            # 扣錢
    acc["outgoing"] += amount                           # 記去 outgoing（排名用）
    acc["history"].append((timestamp, acc["balance"]))   # 記歷史

    cashback = amount * 2 // 100                   # 計算 cashback amount（2%，整數除法）
    cashback_time = timestamp + 86400000             # 24 小時後（毫秒）

    self.payment_counter += 1                        # auto-increment ID
    pid = f"payment{self.payment_counter}"            # "payment1", "payment2", ...
    self.payment[pid] = {  # 記低 payment 資料
        "account_id": account_id,  # 邊個 account 嘅
        "cashback_amount": cashback,  # 回贈幾多
        "cashback_time": cashback_time,  # 幾時到期可收
        "received": False  # 未收過
    }

    return pid  # 回傳 payment ID

pay(1000, "alice", 500) 做咗咩：

# 1. _process_cashbacks(1000) — 先處理舊嘅到期 payment
# 2. check alice 存在 + 夠錢
# 3. 扣 500：alice balance 由 1000 → 500
# 4. outgoing += 500
# 5. history append (1000, 500)
# 6. 計 cashback = 500 * 2 // 100 = 10
# 7. cashback_time = 1000 + 86400000 = 86401000
# 8. payment_counter: 0 → 1
# 9. self.payment["payment1"] = {
#        "account_id": "alice",
#        "cashback_amount": 10,
#        "cashback_time": 86401000,
#        "received": False
#    }
# 10. return "payment1"

L3 嘅 __init__（加 payment 相關）：

def __init__(self):
    self.accounts = {}
    self.payment_counter = 0    # L3 加
    self.payment = {}           # L3 加
    self.merged_accounts = {}   # L4 加
    self.account_locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)  # L5 加

get status（完整 example）

def get_payment_status(self, timestamp, account_id, payment_id):  # 查付款狀態
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)  # 先處理到期嘅 cashback

    if account_id not in self.accounts: return None  # 戶口唔存在
    if payment_id not in self.payment: return None  # payment 唔存在
    if self.payment[payment_id]["account_id"] != account_id: return None  # 唔屬於呢個戶口
    if self.payment[payment_id]["received"]:  # cashback 收咗未？
        return "CASHBACK_RECEIVED"  # 已收
    return "IN_PROGRESS"  # 未到期，仲等緊

get_payment_status 嘅 check 順序：

# 1. account 存唔存在？ → None
# 2. payment_id 存唔存在？ → None
# 3. payment 屬唔屬於呢個 account？ → None
# 4. received == True？ → "CASHBACK_RECEIVED"
# 5. 都唔係？ → "IN_PROGRESS"

# 例子：
# get_payment_status(500, "alice", "payment1")
# → payment1 嘅 cashback_time = 86401000
# → 500 < 86401000 → 未到期 → received 仲係 False
# → return "IN_PROGRESS"
#
# get_payment_status(86402000, "alice", "payment1")
# → _process_cashbacks(86402000) 會先入賬！
# → received 變 True
# → return "CASHBACK_RECEIVED"

L4 — Backup / Merge / Historical Query

get_balance(time_at) 查歷史某個時間嘅 balance（reversed loop history）。merge 合併兩個 account（balance + outgoing 加埋，del 第二個）。

歷史查詢（完整 example）

def get_balance(self, timestamp, account_id, time_at):  # 查餘額（可以查某個時間點嘅）
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)  # 先處理到期嘅 cashback

    if account_id not in self.accounts: return None  # 戶口唔存在

    acc = self.accounts[account_id]  # 攞戶口 pointer
    for ts, val in reversed(acc["history"]):      # 由尾搵返去
        if ts <= time_at:  # 搵到 <= 嗰個時間點嘅 entry
            return val  # 回傳嗰刻嘅 balance

get_balance 點運作：

# history = [(1,0), (3,500), (5,300)]
#
# get_balance(10, "alice", 4) → 問：timestamp=4 嗰陣幾多錢？
# reversed 由尾行：
#   (5,300) → 5 > 4 → skip
#   (3,500) → 3 <= 4 → return 500！
#
# 點解用 reversed？
# 因為 history 係 append-only（timestamp 升序）
# 由尾搵 = 搵最後一個 <= time_at 嘅 entry
# = 嗰個時間點嘅 balance

L4 嘅 __init__（加 merged_accounts）：

def __init__(self):
    self.accounts = {}
    self.payment_counter = 0
    self.payment = {}
    self.merged_accounts = {}    # L4 加
    self.account_locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)

merge / 合併兩個 entity（完整 example）

def merge_accounts(self, timestamp, account_id_1, account_id_2):  # 合併兩個戶口
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)  # 先處理到期嘅 cashback

    if account_id_1 not in self.accounts or account_id_2 not in self.accounts: return False  # 兩個都要存在
    if account_id_1 == account_id_2: return False  # 唔准自己合自己

    acc_1 = self.accounts[account_id_1]  # 攞主戶口（留低嗰個）
    acc_2 = self.accounts[account_id_2]  # 攞副戶口（被吸收嗰個）

    acc_1["balance"] += acc_2["balance"]              # 合併 balance
    acc_1["outgoing"] += acc_2["outgoing"]            # 合併 outgoing
    acc_1["history"].append((timestamp, acc_1["balance"]))  # 記歷史

    self.merged_accounts[account_id_2] = account_id_1  # 記錄：舊 → 新
    del self.accounts[account_id_2]                     # 刪舊 account

    return True  # 合併成功

merge_accounts(10, "alice", "bob") 做咗咩：

# 之前：
# alice: balance=300, outgoing=200
# bob:   balance=400, outgoing=0
#
# 之後：
# alice: balance=700, outgoing=200
# bob:   已刪（del）
# self.merged_accounts = {"bob": "alice"}
#
# 合併規則：
# 1. 兩個都要存在 + 唔係同一個
# 2. acc_1 吸收 acc_2 嘅 balance + outgoing
# 3. 記低邊個 merge 去邊個
# 4. 刪 acc_2

backup / deepcopy：

import copy
snapshot = copy.deepcopy(self.accounts)
# 完整複製，改 snapshot 唔影響原本
# 用途：backup / restore

L5 — Concurrent Batch Processing

同時處理多個 operations。Skeleton：async def + execute_op + gather + lock。入面嘅 if/elif 因應題目改。抄 template 改幾行就得。

# 第一步：先定義點樣處理單一 op
# 第二步：按張單會郁幾多個 account 去攞鎖
# 第三步：收集晒 coroutine，再一次過 gather
async def process_batch(self, timestamp, operations):  # 批量處理一堆銀行動作，好似同時開幾個 clerk 做單
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)  # 開工前先補返到期 cashback，避免舊數未入賬就即刻做新單

    async def execute_op(op):                     # 每次只處理一張單，最後會畀 gather 一齊放出去跑
        # 第一步：transfer 會同時郁兩個戶口，所以要先排好鎖嘅次序
        if op["type"] == "transfer":  # 呢種單係由一個戶口搬錢去另一個戶口
            keys = sorted([op["source_id"], op["target_id"]])  # 永遠照同一個次序攞鎖，避免兩張單互相等死
            async with self.account_locks[keys[0]]:  # 先鎖排前面嗰個戶口
                async with self.account_locks[keys[1]]:  # 再鎖第二個戶口，兩邊都安全先真正過數
                    return self.transfer(timestamp, op["source_id"], op["target_id"], op["amount"])  # 借返同步 transfer 真正搬錢，呢度只負責排隊同保護資料

        # 第二步：deposit / pay 只會郁一個戶口，鎖一邊就夠
        aid = op["account_id"]  # 呢張單實際上會改邊個戶口，就用佢做排隊 key
        async with self.account_locks[aid]:  # 同一個戶口一次只畀一張單入去改，避免 balance 互相踩爛
            if op["type"] == "deposit":  # 呢張係入錢單
                return self.deposit(timestamp, op["account_id"], op["amount"])  # 交返畀同步 deposit 真正加錢
            elif op["type"] == "pay":  # 呢張係付款單
                return self.pay(timestamp, op["account_id"], op["amount"])  # 交返畀同步 pay 真正扣錢同記 outgoing

    # 第三步：將所有單包成 coroutine，一次過同時開工
    tasks = []  # 呢個 list 好似待辦單夾，逐張收埋等陣一齊交畀 gather
    for op in operations:  # 行晒你傳入嚟嘅每張單
        tasks.append(execute_op(op))  # 先包成 coroutine，未真跑住
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)  # 一次過放晒出去跑，各自靠 lock 保護同一個戶口
    return list(results)  # caller 會收到每張單各自嘅結果，順序同原本 operations 一致

L5 嘅 __init__（加 account_locks）：

def __init__(self):
    self.accounts = {}
    self.payment_counter = 0
    self.payment = {}
    self.merged_accounts = {}
    self.account_locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)  # L5 加

L5 嘅 data structure：

# 冇加新 user data field
# 多咗 self.account_locks（concurrency 用）
# defaultdict(asyncio.Lock) = 每次 access 新 key 自動建一把 Lock

Lock 點用：

# transfer 要鎖兩個 account（防止 A→B 同 B→A 同時跑）
# 點解 sorted？防 deadlock：
#   Thread 1: lock(alice) → lock(bob)
#   Thread 2: lock(alice) → lock(bob)    # 同順序 → 安全
# 如果唔 sort：
#   Thread 1: lock(alice) → lock(bob)
#   Thread 2: lock(bob) → lock(alice)    # 互相等 → deadlock！

# deposit / pay 淨係一個 account → 鎖一個就夠

L5 用嘅 helper：

# 冇新 helper
# 直接 call 返 transfer / deposit / pay
# gather 同時跑所有 op，lock 保證同一 account 唔會 race

L6 — Rate Limited External Call

同 L5 一樣但加 Semaphore 限制同時幾多個。Lock 包住改 data，Sem 包住外部 call（sleep）。Failed 嘅 return False 唔 sleep。抄 template 改 check + 扣錢嗰段就得。

# 第一步：先喺本地鎖住戶口做 fail-fast 檢查
# 第二步：真係扣到錢先離開 lock
# 第三步：過關嘅單先入 semaphore，模擬外部 API 慢慢處理
async def process_external_transfers(self, timestamp, transfers, max_concurrent):  # 一批外部轉賬同時做，但真外部位會限流
    self._process_cashbacks(timestamp)  # 開工前先補返到期 cashback，避免餘額仲停喺舊數
    sem = asyncio.Semaphore(max_concurrent)      # 好似外部 API 只得 N 個窗口，一次最多放 N 單出去

    async def do_transfer(t):  # 每次處理一張外部轉賬單
        aid = t["account_id"]  # 呢張單實際上要喺邊個戶口扣錢
        lock = self.account_locks[aid]  # 同一個戶口好似同一個櫃位，一次只畀一張單改

        # 第一步：先做本地 fail-fast 檢查，唔合格就即刻踢走
        async with lock:                               # 改餘額同歷史之前，先鎖住個戶口
            if aid not in self.accounts:  # 連戶口都冇，呢張單根本冇得做
                return False                              # 即刻作廢，唔會去搶外部 API 名額
            if self.accounts[aid]["balance"] < t["amount"]:  # 餘額不足，好似客人卡入面唔夠錢
                return False                              # 一樣即場失敗，唔好白白排外面個 API 隊

            # 第二步：本地戶口過到關，就正式扣錢同落簿
            self.accounts[aid]["balance"] -= t["amount"]  # 真正喺戶口扣走呢筆錢
            self.accounts[aid]["outgoing"] += t["amount"]  # 將呢筆支出加落 outgoing，之後計 top spenders 會用到
            self.accounts[aid]["history"].append((timestamp, self.accounts[aid]["balance"]))  # 落簿，等之後查 statement 知道扣完之後仲剩幾多

        # 第三步：只得成功扣到錢嘅單，先入 semaphore 模擬外部過數
        async with sem:                                # 而家先去搶外部 API 窗口，避免無謂阻住其他真單
            await asyncio.sleep(0.01)                  # 模擬真正打去外部支付網關要等一陣

        return True  # 本地扣數同外部 call 都完成，呢張單先算真係做完

    tasks = []  # 收集每張轉賬單嘅 coroutine，等陣一齊放出去跑
    for t in transfers:  # 行晒成批外部轉賬單
        tasks.append(do_transfer(t))  # 先包成 coroutine，未真跑住
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)  # 全部同時跑，各自靠 lock 同 sem 守規矩
    return list(results)  # caller 會收到每張單係成功定失敗，順序同原本 transfers 一樣

L6 嘅 __init__（同 L5 一樣）：

def __init__(self):
    self.accounts = {}
    self.payment_counter = 0
    self.payment = {}
    self.merged_accounts = {}
    self.account_locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)

L5 vs L6 分別：

# L5：gather + Lock
#   全部同時跑，鎖住 account 防 race
#
# L6：gather + Lock + Semaphore
#   Lock 包住改 data
#   Sem 包住外部 call（限制同時幾多個）
#   分開用！唔好 nested

Lock vs Semaphore：

# Lock = 一把鎖，同一時間只有一個 task 拎到
#   用途：保護 data（balance 扣錢唔 race）
#
# Semaphore(N) = N 張准考證
#   用途：限制同時幾多個 task 做外部 call
#   例如 max_concurrent=3 → 同時最多 3 個 sleep

Fail-fast 重點：

# check 失敗嘅 → return False
# 唔入 sem、唔 sleep、唔佔准考證
# 只有 check 過咗嘅先入 sem + sleep
# 呢個 pattern 喺 L6 spec 有明確要求
L5 vs L6 分別：
L5：gather + Lock（全部同時跑，鎖住 account）
# 只顧住本地戶口會唔會互撞；冇外部名額限制 L6：gather + Lock + Semaphore（限制同時幾多個 + 模擬外部 call）

# 先用 lock 保住本地帳，再用 semaphore 控住外部 API 幾多人同時入閘 Lock 同 Sem 分開用。Lock 包住改 data，Sem 包住外部 call。

Gotchas（做過嘅錯誤）

Error Message 點讀

Error意思點修
TypeError: takes N args but M givenparam 數量錯check 有冇 self / 有冇漏 timestamp
AttributeError: 'dict' has no attribute 'X'用咗 dot access dict改做 d["X"]
KeyError: 'X'dict 冇呢個 key先 check if key in d
AssertionError: None is not truefunction 冇 return加 return True/False
NameError: name 'X' not definedvariable 未定義check 串字 / scope

口訣：1. 睇 Error 類型 2. 睇 > 嗰行（test 點 call 你） 3. 對比你嘅 code

Quick Reference

要做咩Code
建空 dictd = {}
加/改d[key] = value
刪del d[key]
check 存在if key in d:
攞 value（safe）d.get(key)
loop dictfor k, v in d.items():
建空 listlst = []
加去尾lst.append(x)
頭 n 個lst[:n]
format stringf"{name}({value})"
join list", ".join(lst)
sort desc+ascsorted(items, key=lambda x: (-x[1], x[0]))
deep copycopy.deepcopy(data)
reversed loopfor ts, val in reversed(lst):
auto IDself.counter += 1; id = f"item{self.counter}"
round downamount * 2 // 100
同時跑tasks = [] for x in items: tasks.append(fn(x)) await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
鎖住async with lock:
限制數量sem = asyncio.Semaphore(n); async with sem:

Hotel System — 酒店房間管理，Flat Dict + Lazy Fee

一間酒店：book 入住、checkout 退房、late fee 遲退罰款、upgrade 搬房。同 Bank 幾乎一樣嘅 pattern，只係 domain 唔同。

# Hotel 同 Bank 嘅核心對照：
# Bank account  → Hotel room
# Bank balance  → Hotel total_revenue
# Bank cashback → Hotel late_fee（lazy 收費）
# Bank merge    → Hotel upgrade（搬人唔合併房）

# Hotel 獨有嘅嘢：
# guest_name == "" → available（可 book）
# guest_name != "" → occupied（已入住）
# checkout 唔刪 room，只係清空 guest_name
# booking_id 自動遞增："booking1", "booking2", ...

Hotel 係 Bank 嘅「換皮版」。data structure 同邏輯 90% 一樣，改嘅只係 field name 同 domain rule。 

Bank                    Hotel
─────────────────────── ───────────────────────
create_account          add_room / book_room
get_balance             get_room_info
deposit/withdraw        （冇，revenue 自動計）
top_spenders            top_rooms（by revenue）
cashback                late_fee
merge                   upgrade_room（搬人唔合併）
batch_operations        batch_operations（一樣）
sync                    send_notifications（fail-fast）
base = Bank — function 對照 
── L1 CRUD ──
🟰 book_room          同 Bank create_account 一樣
⚠️ checkout           Bank 冇對應（Hotel 獨有）
🟰 get_room_info      同 Bank get_balance 類似

── L2 Sort ──
🟰 list_rooms         同 Bank list_accounts 一樣
🟰 top_revenue        同 Bank top_spenders 一樣 pattern

── L3 Late Fee ──
⚠️ set_late_fee       Bank 用 cashback 加錢，Hotel 用 late fee 扣錢
🟰 _process_late_fee  同 Bank _process_cashbacks 一樣 lazy pattern

── L4 Backup ──
🟰 backup / restore   同 Bank 完全一樣（deepcopy）
⚠️ upgrade_room       Bank merge 加 balance，Hotel upgrade 換房型

── L5 Batch ──
🟰 batch_operations   同 Bank L5 一樣（lock per room_id）

── L6 Sync ──
🟰 sync               同 Bank L6 一樣（fail-fast + sleep）
黃底行 = skeleton，直接抄
# 右邊 inline comment 會好似咁，直接講白呢行實際做乜 灰色斜體行 = 因應題目改（Hotel System 做例子）

__init__

import asyncio
from collections import defaultdict

class HotelSystem:
    def __init__(self):
        self.rooms = {}                                     # L1 room_id → room info dict
        self.booking_counter = 0                             # L1 自動遞增 booking ID
        self.rooms_locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)         # L5 加：per-room_id 嘅 async lock
self.rooms 實際樣子：
{
  "r1": {
    "price_per_night": 100,
    "guest_name": "Alice",
    "nights": 2,
    "total_revenue": 200,
    "check_in_time": 1,
    "late_fee": 0,
    "late_fee_time": 1,
    "history": [],
    "booking_id": "booking1"
  }
}

guest_name == "" → available
guest_name != "" → occupied
late_fee 擺喺 room 入面（唔係外面 list）
逐個 level 加咩 field：
L1：rooms dict, booking_counter
L3：late_fee, late_fee_time（塞入 room dict 入面）
L4：history[]（塞入 room dict 入面）
L5：rooms_locks = defaultdict(asyncio.Lock)
L6：（冇加新 field，semaphore 喺 method 入面開）

Helper — _process_late_fee（Lazy 收費）

lazy = 唔係 background timer，係每個 public method 開頭 call 一次。逐個 room check 有冇遲退費到期 → 到期就加去 revenue 再清零。

# Helper: _process_late_fee — lazy 收費（每個 public method 開頭都 call）
def _process_late_fee(self, timestamp):             # 注意係 late_fee 單數
    for room_id, room in self.rooms.items():       # 逐間 room 睇
        if room["late_fee"] > 0 and timestamp >= room["late_fee_time"]:  # 有 fee 且到期
            room["total_revenue"] += room["late_fee"]  # 加去 revenue
            room["late_fee"] = 0                         # 清零（收完了）
helper 嘅職責：
_process_late_fee(timestamp)
    行一次 self.rooms
    凡係：
      1. late_fee > 0（有未收嘅費）
      2. timestamp >= late_fee_time（到期）
    就 revenue += fee，fee = 0
    每個 public method 第一行都 call 一次（lazy 模式）
同 Bank _process_cashbacks 比較：
Bank：cashback 到期 → balance += amount（加錢）
Hotel：late_fee 到期 → revenue += fee（加入收入）

Bank：cashback 用獨立 list self.pending_cashbacks
Hotel：late_fee 塞喺 room dict 入面（更簡單）

共通點：都係 lazy（唔係 background timer）
        都係每個 public method 開頭 call
        都係到期就結算，結算完就清走

L1 — CRUD（Hotel）

add_room + book_room + checkout

def add_room(self, timestamp, room_id, price_per_night):  # 加一間新房
    self._process_late_fee(timestamp)      # L3 加：先處理到期嘅 late fee

    if room_id in self.rooms:  # 呢間房已經存在？
        return False  # 已有 → 唔再加

    self.rooms[room_id] = {  # 建立新房間，記低所有 field
        "price_per_night": price_per_night,  # 每晚幾錢
        "guest_name": "",  # 空 = 冇人住
        "nights": "",  # 住幾晚（book 時先填）
        "total_revenue": 0,  # 累計收入
        "check_in_time": timestamp,  # 上次 check-in 時間
        "late_fee": 0,                        # L3 加
        "late_fee_time": timestamp,            # L3 加
        "history": [],                          # L4 加
        "booking_id": ""  # 而家冇 booking
    }

    return True  # 加房成功
def book_room(self, timestamp, room_id, guest_name, nights):  # 訂房
    self._process_late_fee(timestamp)  # 先處理到期 fee

    if room_id not in self.rooms: return None  # 房間唔存在
    room = self.rooms[room_id]  # 攞房間 pointer
    if room["guest_name"] != "": return None  # 有人住緊 → 唔得 book

    room["guest_name"] = guest_name  # 記低邊個住
    room["nights"] = nights  # 記住幾晚
    room["total_revenue"] += room["price_per_night"] * nights  # 即刻計收入
    room["check_in_time"] = timestamp  # 記 check-in 時間

    self.booking_counter += 1  # 自動遞增 ID
    booking_id_str = f"booking{self.booking_counter}"  # 生成 "booking1", "booking2"...
    room["booking_id"] = booking_id_str  # 記入房間資料

    return booking_id_str  # 回傳 booking ID
def checkout(self, timestamp, room_id):  # 退房
    self._process_late_fee(timestamp)  # 先處理到期 fee

    if room_id not in self.rooms: return None  # 房間唔存在
    room = self.rooms[room_id]  # 攞房間 pointer
    if room["guest_name"] == "": return None  # 冇人住 → 冇得退

    guest_name = room["guest_name"]  # 記住客人名（等陣 return 用）
    room["guest_name"] = ""  # 清空 = 退咗房
    room["history"].append((guest_name, room["price_per_night"] * room["nights"])) # L4 加
    room["nights"] = 0  # 清零晚數

    return guest_name  # 回傳退房嘅人名
book_room(1, "r1", "Alice", 2) 之後：
"r1": {
  "guest_name": "Alice",    ← 入住
  "nights": 2,
  "total_revenue": 200,           ← 100 * 2
  "booking_id": "booking1"
}
checkout(5, "r1") 之後：
"r1": {
  "guest_name": "",         ← 走咗
  "total_revenue": 200,           ← 唔變
  "history": [("Alice", 200)] ← 加咗
}
return "Alice"  ← return 名，唔係 True
撞過嘅板：
# book_room return booking ID
# 唔係 return True/balance
bid = "booking1"  ← return 呢個

# checkout return guest name
# 唔係 return True/False
return "Alice"    ← return 呢個

# check occupied 用 guest_name
if room["guest_name"] != "":  ← occupied
if room["guest_name"] == "":  ← available

L2 — Search + Revenue（Hotel）

def top_rooms(self, timestamp, n):  # 排頭 N 間最多收入嘅房
    self._process_fees(timestamp)  # 先處理到期 fee

    sorted_items = dict(sorted(  # 排序：revenue 大排先，同分按房名 asc
        self.rooms.items(),  # 將全部房間攤平畀 sorted 排收入榜；之後先切頭 N 間
        key=lambda x: (-x[1]["total_revenue"], x[0])  # -值 = desc，名 = asc
    ))

    result = []  # 準備裝 format 完嘅 string
    for room_id, room in sorted_items.items():  # 逐間房行
        result.append(f"{room_id}({room['revenue']})")  # 格式化成 "房名(收入)"

    return result[:n]  # 淨攞頭 N 個
def find_available(self, timestamp, min_price, max_price):  # 搵有空嘅房
    self._process_fees(timestamp)  # 先處理到期 fee

    sorted_items = dict(sorted(  # 按價錢排（平排先）
        self.rooms.items(),  # 將全部房資料交畀 sorted 排價錢；之後先慢慢篩有冇人住
        key=lambda x: (x[1]["price_per_night"], x[0])  # 價錢 asc，同價按名 asc
    ))

    result = []  # 準備裝符合條件嘅房
    for room_id, room in sorted_items.items():  # 逐間房行
        if min_price <= room["price_per_night"] <= max_price and room["guest_name"] == "":  # 價錢啱 + 冇人住
            result.append(room_id)  # 加入結果

    return result  # 回傳所有符合嘅房
find_available sort by price asc：
rooms = {
  "r1": {"price": 100, "guest": "Alice"},
  "r2": {"price": 150, "guest": ""},
  "r3": {"price": 80,  "guest": ""}
}
find_available(1, 50, 200)
→ ["r3", "r2"]
# r1 有人住，排除
# r3(80) 排先，r2(150) 排後
撞過嘅板：
# find_available 要 check occupied！
# 唔係淨 check price range
if price_ok and room["guest_name"] == "":
#                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
#                 漏咗呢個就全部 room 都出嚟

L3 — Late Checkout Fees（Hotel）

def late_checkout(self, timestamp, room_id, extra_hours):  # 延遲退房（加 fee）
    self._process_late_fee(timestamp)  # 先處理到期 fee
